1.content:
On both planets almost everything was normal for the inhabitants. Well except for one planet, strange portals appeared everywhere. Curious inhabitants approached these portals and a few even entered the portals. With a loud whoosh the inhabitants found themselves moving at high speed to a distant planet. On the distant planet whose day until then had been normal portals began to appear. Bizarrely the portals opened and exited in similar areas (desert to desert, jungle to jungle etc.) Much to the terror of the inhabitants on the exiting side was the giant animals coming out of the portals. To the 'giants' they were confused at their now shrunken surroundings.

So the fun begins and where in the 'small' world are we?
1.title: The Portals Appear

11.content: So we're in a large city? What sort of giant shall we follow?
11.title: A City

111.content: So we'll be following an giant anthro carnivore? But what carnivore?
111.title: Anthro Carnivore

1111.content: So an giant anthro dog shall be visiting the city? What breed?
1111.title: Anthro Dog

1112.content:
So an Anthro Cat? But what kind of Cat?

Big Cat

Medium Cat

Domestic Cat
1112.title: Anthro Cat

112.content: Which of these will you pick?
112.title: Anthro Herbivore

113.content:
So we'll be following a dog?

- Greyhound(s) from the Greyhound track.

- Stray(s)

-Police Dog (German Shepherd)
113.title: Dog

1132.content: A stray dog huh? Any specific breed?
1132.title: Stray dog

11321.content:
It was a peaceful morning in the city, well it was about as peaceful as it could be with the street filled with as much activity as there was. Nobody was prepared for what was about to happen, as somewhere in the middle of the city a mysterious giant portal appeared. Suddenly something pops out of the portal as it closes with a loud sound, as everybody looked up they all uttered two words. “A Doberman” even though what they were seeing was plain as day the people still had troubles perceiving it, thoughts like how was this even possible crossed their minds. But one thought persisted over all else “what is going to happen”, as if answering the questions the giant raises his paw while all the people below look up with awe speechless. Then with speeds almost not matching it’s incredible height it lowers the paw smashing it right in the middle of downtown. The resulting impact creating a shockwave that envelopes everything within range, then the 500 foot tall canine barks out which causes people all over the city to cover their ears.

The dog hasn’t even noticed the people or even the city right underneath him, though the people didn’t know whether that was a good or bad thing. The Doberman slowly lifts the other massive paw up and again puts it back down, this doesn’t seem like a lot of effort is put into it but the effects on the world below is anything but harmless. And now with two massive craters and a whole lot of destruction underpaw he finally takes notice of the world below him, The giant dog...
11321.title: Doberman

choices: Thinks it should just be flattened under his paws
113211.content:
Even the tallest buildings were only 200 feet tall, they weren’t even able to come up to his belly. As the massive Doberman looked down at all the tiny people and buildings a wicked grin appeared on its muzzle, this in turn caused the humans in the city to panic. The dog crushes an overpass with his humongous black paw pads, then with a loud deafening howl he smashes his muscled leg through a row of high rises. Licking his lips the Doberman crushes several cars in a parking lot, as the police start to show up he looks down to a blockade of police and SWAT cars with officers hiding behind cars and firing their pistols. Although the most the bullets can do is provide a minor annoyance about on par with a bug bite, growling menacingly the huge canine pounces down onto the blockade crushing the cars and officers in his way.

Slowly so as to enjoy the feeling of everything under his mighty paws, he stomps through the blockade watching the whole police force run from him. Then he walks over to where all the tallest buildings are, with every single step crushing multiple people and cars. You arrive in a short amount of time looking down at what was supposed to be the crowning achievement of the whole city, but as it was grand for human standards the dog couldn’t help but think how pathetic it looked in his presence. The dog then...
113211.title: Naughty dog

11322.content: Is it male or female?
11322.title: Husky

113221.content: The story starts with a giant portal opening with a loud crack in the middle of a huge forest densely populated with wildlife, and then with a huge 2,500 foot tall husky with a decent size sheathe stepping out and crushing some of the wildlife under his paw. The feeling of crushing the animals underpaw makes him feel powerful and slightly aroused, he then spots a few hikers on a trail and decided to...
113221.title: In the forest

114.content:
So we'll be following a taur? A feral body with four legs with paws/hooves. They also have a human like torso where the neck should be. This of course gives them four legs and two arms with dexterous hands. Now Taurs are a fairly primitive species. Intelligent but stuck in a more basic pre industrial/gun free world. They typically wear basic clothing, use older weapons, swords, longbows, daggers, maces etc. Their time period could be from ancient Greece through to the middle ages.

So are we following a carnivore or herbivore taur?
114.title: Taur

1141.content: So a carnivorous Taur? What family?
1141.title: Carnivore Taur

114111.content:
So a Tiger Taur?

Now we have various sub species to choose from...
114111.title: Tiger Taur

1141111.content:
So the mighty Siberian (amur) Tiger. The largest Tiger sub species and with a very thick coat. Like their (our) real world counterpart they inhabit a Taiga/boreal forest biome. Being a big Cat they are solitary creatures, apart from when mating or with young. Siberian Tiger Taurs carry two weapons. A Longbow and quiver over their upper torso. Also a long great sword that is kept in a leather scabbard along their feral body side. Great leather straps hold the weapons in place. On their free feral side they have bags to carry meat along with leather water bottles. They prefer to use their claws for grip or to hold down struggling prey before they deliver a killing blow.


Are we following a male or female?
1141111.title: Siberian Tiger Taur

11411112.content:
Anastasia was carefully stalking through the Taiga. Her keen nose on the scent of prey. She slowly lifted her long bow and aimed at the Deer. Her four massive paws with unsheathed claws gripped the ground as she prepared to let the arrow fly. Her whole body was covered in thick fur and underneath even thicker muscles. She was without doubt one of the biggest Siberian Tiger Taurs to have lived. Her arm muscles flexed as she pulled the arrow back and then she let the arrow fly. But before she could see her arrow hit true a great wind whipped up. Blowing her arrow off course and spooking the Deer. ''What the hell is going on?!'' She snarled as the wind grew stronger then a blinding light filled her vision. She covered her eyes as she felt herself being pulled up into the sky and then she blacked out...

Slowly she came around. her vision coming back along with her other senses. But the sight and smells were off. The forest was gone? She rubbed her head as she sat up. Looking over herself she still had her longbow, quiver, great sword and water bottle. ''I haven't lost my things at least'' She whispered to herself as she focused on her surroundings. Before her was a large city. Now on her world there were small villages with huts but nothing like this! 'It looks like a town, but why is it taking up so much space? Why are the houses no bigger than a toe?' She thought. She stood up and took a step forwards. Now to her it was a normal step. But to the humans it was like a clap of thunder that shook the surrounding area. She had landed on a large field outside of the suburbs. Near to her were several roads that led into the city or surrounding countryside. Now she her world mostly had mud trail but hard surfaced roads did exist. But like the house a road was no widen than a toe. 'There seems to be roads as well... Wait what are those metal growly things?' She thought as she spotted the roads and vehicles. But her nose and eyes then came upon the humans. ''Wow! What are those funny looking creatures?'' She said aloud. Her voice was just as thunderous as her paw steps.

Now the humans had first been attracted to the strange phenomenon happening outside the city. The light was bright and seemed to be whipping up a wind storm. Curious onlookers came to watch this strange light. The police arrived to hold back crowds as reports came in all over the world of similar occurrences. Then without warning and with a loud bang and blinding flash the phenomenon vanished. Though in it's place was a great furry mound of orange and black fur. Mouths dropped as the people looked upon her unconscious form. Not only was she huge but she had weapons strapped to her 'misshapen' body People started to run or took pictures as with a loud grumble the Gigantic Tiger woke up. First the Tiger looked herself over before looking into the city. Only when the beast stood up and took a step forwards did panic ensure. Her paw slammed down with a ear splitting thud. It sunk into the earth, flinging mud everywhere. Many were knocked over by the heavy impact, painful thud and blast of displaced air. What really got people panicking was when she looked down at them with her golden eyes.

Anastasia despite being a huge powerful predator was actually a fairly calm tempered beast. Being so big she had little to prove. She still took no shit, many a male had scars to prove it. She was a good shot with her bow and a keen swordsman. She squatted down over the road and reached out with a hand. Her claws sheathed to make herself look less intimidating. ''I won't be rough!' She said reassuringly to the humans. Her words to them though were growls and snarls. Which made them run from her in pure terror. But thanks to her huge size she easily managed to catch a small group. Carefully she scooped them up onto her hand and lifted them up. The humans ran about on her hand in desperation looking for an escape route. ''No escape from here!'' She giggled as she watched them run about on her hand. She sniffed at them and looked them over intently. ''Hmmm... You're the size of bugs, but can't be. Though I've never heard or such a small people. Just what are you creatures?'' She said to the humans. Of course all they got was a bunch of snarls and growls. Their words were gibberish to her. ''Well this is getting no where. What should I do with you little guys?'' She pondered. Sitting on her hind legs. Her large butt thumping loudly against the ground.

Now she was going to check out the city next but just what does Anastasia do with the humans in her hand?
11411112.title: Meet Anastasia, the female Siberian Tiger Taur

114111121.content:
Anastasia pondered for a few moments. 'They are clearly scared of me and I can't understand a word they say. Maybe I'll just put them down, show that I'm friendly' She decided to release them. She crouched down and held her hand flat on the ground. The humans quickly ran off and away. She grinned as she lifted her hand back up. ''Bye cuties!'' She said softly. She stood back up and turned her attention to the passing vehicles. ''I must check out those!'' She cried. To the humans her cry was a boneshaking snarl. Desperately cars bashed into each other and went off road to get away from her. She took a step forwards, again shaking the ground and causing some cars to crash. She heard the crashes and grinned sheepishly ''Whoops! Maybe I should be more careful with my big feet!'' She lifted her paw and studied the print she'd left. To her it was no different to normal. To the humans her print was 6ft deep and the size of a mansion.

She focused once more on the vehicles. The crashed one smoked as the passengers leapt out. ''Ah! For transportation I see... But how without Horses?!'' She reached down for the closest car. Gripping it between two fingers she lifted it up and brought it to her face. She gave it the once over. Looking at it from all sides and sniffing it thoroughly. The petrol and oil was so unpleasant to her. ''Eww. Gross!'' She chucked the car away, it crashed down in another field and exploded. This made her jump. ''Shit!'' She roared as she leapt back in surprise. Her four paws slammed down violently. The ground quaked violently and sent out small fissures. Miraculously nobody was squished. though some unlucky humans had her land over them. The four paws blew out their eardrums, the violent impact tossed them about as did the four lots of displaced air. Dazed and bruised they had an impressive view of her belly. Her four skyscraper thick muscular legs and paws loomed around them.

She looked underneath herself. ''Sorry about that!'' She apologised as she carefully stepped over them. She was careful not to shake the ground to much. She resorted to her slow and steady stalking stance. Her footsteps whilst still leaving deep prints were nearly silent and displaced little air. Her thick soft pads aiding in the silent steps. She headed for the city. Reaching the first house she stopped and looked down at it. To her it was the size of her muzzle, she could likely fit it in her open mouth! Her hand was larger than the house ''I wonder what they are made out of. Better have a closer look.'' She crouched down and reached for the house...

Now how does her house checking work out?
114111121.title: Just one big friendly and curious Tigress

1141111211.content:
Her five fingers come over the house and grip it. With a loud crack! The walls splinter and glass shatters as she held it to hard. Unfortunately for her and the humans she was a very powerful girl. She gasped as she released her grip. ''Oh my! So fragile!'' She gasped. The houses occupants ran out as their house cracked around them. They were greeted with her leaning over them. They pointed at her and screamed. She grinned sheepishly. ''That wasn't supposed to happen!'' She said to them, of course to the humans she was growling at them. She sighed as the humans turned and ran screaming. ''This place is so weird. But these little creatures sure our cute. If a little fearful'' She muttered to herself as she looked ahead deeper into the city. Her eyes came upon the taller apartments, office blocks, skyscrapers and shops. 'Those look more my size! Maybe they are stronger?' She stepped over the house and planted her paws on gardens and the streets. She was to big to got between the houses, she'd have to straddle them between her legs.

''Watch out little ones!'' She said as she carefully stepped into the suburbs. She had to wait for humans to get out of her way before she'd bring her paws down. Gardens were ruined as were the streets. Her paws easily shattering the tarmac and leaving a trail of paw prints. Occasionally she brushed a house with a paw. Ripping off entire roofs. ''Sorry!'' She would say to the fleeing occupants. Whilst most humans had one thing in mind - getting the hell out of here a few realised the Tigress was acting 'odd.' She could easily just stomp through the suburbs yet she was clearly carefully stepping over houses and letting people get out of her way. She had the occasional accident. But she seemed to look back with a sorrowful expression on her face. The curious people watched and recorded her as she strolled on through their city.

Another side effect of her passing was windows shattered and some weaker houses cracked. Her long tail swished about behind her. Also occasionally smacking into houses. With far more destructive results. She didn't notice this, she was to busy looking ahead or apologising for damage caused by her paws. Now she had made it through the suburbs with fairly good results. Though she had still left a rather obvious trail behind herself. But next were the apartments buildings. Whilst far taller than the houses they still barely reached her belly. ''These are bigger. How interesting'' she muttered as she looked at the apartments. But she also looked at the surrounding area. Various things caught her attention... Where does our big curious girl go next?
1141111211.title: Some unintentional destruction

11411112112.content:
Her keen eyes studied various different palaces. The bus station, a mall caught her eye but what really got her interest was the humans. Most were running from her. But some were either standing and watching her or even approaching her? These humans also had strange metal tablets in their hands that they pointed at her. 'Are they drawing me?' She thought. The tablets of course being smartphones. The humans 'art strokes' were them snapping pictures or zooming in and out. She grinned. If they wanted to draw her she'd just as well put on a pose. Being a big powerful predator she stood up tall and proud. She reached for her great sword and slowly unsheathed it. The long blade glistened in the sunlight. She always kept it in pristine and sharp condition. She was careful to pull the weapon out slow, she didn't want to give the wrong impression. Unfortunately the sight of her pulling out her blade did scare off some of her recorders. Though several remained in place or continued to approach her.

She lifted the sword before her and held it in a striking pose. Shifting her hindlegs she inadvertently demolished a house. ''Oops! Sorry about that! But surely this pose is better for your art?'' She said to the humans. Still her words nothing but growls and snarls. Some of her recorders flinched, but when she just held the pose and smiled softly it was clear she was just posing, well at least they hoped so. They kept recording her, whilst three braver humans were just a few steps away from her. The stopped to admire her gigantic paw standing before them. Great slits indicating her sheathed claws. Her pink soft pads could also been seen underneath. They followed her thick legs to her muscular chest/upper torso. Beyond was her head. So far she was still looking away at people further away. Cautiously they stepped closer and reach out. Stroking the side of her paw. Her fur so thick and soft. Looking up she hadn't seemed to notice. They pushed in deeper...

Anastasia held her pose 'got to give them time to draw me! At least some of them trust me!' She thought happily. She felt something stroking her left fore paw. ''What's that?'' She muttered as she looked down and laughed. Three of the humans were stroking her paw! Now her paws were 40ft tall, easily 7 times taller than a human. But the size difference didn't bother her. Waves of pleasure shot through her paw and up her leg. ''Ooh...mmm'' she moaned as the humans continued to stroke her. ''Ah! Yes! Keep going!'' She moaned, to the humans her words were the typical Tiger chuffs. The humans realised her chuffs were a friendly greeting and so they kept going. To others watching it was even more obvious now that she was friendly.

Anastasia was absolutely loving this! She sheathed her sword and looked down at her massagers. She kept her mouth closed to look less intimidating and continued to chuff away. This continued for five minutes. She wanted to get a massage on her pads. She carefully lifted the paw and tipped it on it's side. Gently she brought if down the other side of the humans. They were a little shocked by the move but when the was presented with the bottom of her paw it was obvious what she wanted. Now her pink pads were thick and soft. But also covered in pieces of dirt, tarmac, crushed lampposts and the odd crushed car (unoccupied before crushed). ''I hope my pads aren't to dirty little ones.'' She said softly, she wanted them to stroke not clean them off. The humans started to stroke her soft squishy pads and peeled off the odd chunk of tarmac and dirt. Anastasia just couldn't believe this! A clean and massage, she was moving in here! The humans stroked and cleaned as much as her paw that they could reach.

She lifted her paw back and offered her other paws. She was happy to see the three humans head to her other paws. But more joined in. Before she knew it she had a small crowd working her paws over! Her tail swished about she held her head back and chuffed away contently. For ten minutes her paws were massaged by the humans. She lifted her paws to study the humans handiwork. ''Nice one cuties! Now for me to return the favour!'' She would of loved to lay down, but she'd end up destroying their homes. She reached down and offered her hands for the humans to climb upon. ''Get on! I won't hurt you!'' She said softly. The humans stared at her offered hand and finally some climbed on. She lifted them up and...
11411112112.title: Making human friends

choices: She's smelling the out of city farms
A portal opens and gives her giant prey
114111121122.content:
Carefully she lifted the humans up into the air. She kept her hand as flat and level as possible. She may be a huge powerful predator but she wouldn't let this go to her head. She followed a fairly strict moral code. Picking on ones smaller and weaken than oneself was taboo. She always followed this code, many a Taur who had been caught breaking it had met her blade and arrows. To her the humans were clearly needing her protection. She really wanted to hug them, but having felt how fragile their buildings and vehicles are she was worried she'd crush them. But she was about to do something extremely rare. Many Taurs, Tigers especially despite making a potential mount for a anthro would never be treated as a beast of burden. They would refuse to carry anthros on their backs, with the use of a sword if necessary. But now the humans were so small, light and not in a position to order her around like some glorified Horse. She held them before her head. Her eye the same height as them. She smiled softly. The humans stared at her and shivered. ''Now, I said I wasn't going to hurt you'' she whispered softly. She was careful not to show off her fangs. She sealed her mouth and chuffed at them. Once the humans had stopped shivering she slowly lowered them onto her back. ''You should be honoured, I don't carry anyone there usually'' she tipped the humans right onto her back. They partly sank into her thick warm fur. She grinned, for they were going to be safe. They could hold onto her fur if necessary.

She looked down for more humans to pick up. But as she lowered her hand.... GRRRRUMBBLE! She gasped as did the humans as her belly growled. She sighed as she had been so occupied with this new place she'd forgotten her meal. Namely the Deer that had been 'saved' by the portal that whiskered her here. She rubbed her stomach, which was contained in her lower body. ''I need to get something to eat!'' She looked about and sniffed. She could eat the humans... No! How barbaric! Her nose did pick up the familiar scent of prey. Though it was weak. 'They must have the prey here. But it must be small as well?!' She thought. She sniffed again trying to track down the source of prey...
114111121122.title: Human passengers and an empty belly

choices: An arrow to the kn... Err skyscraper.
1141111211223.content:
Just as she was about to track down the prey a familiar phenomenon started on the opposite side of the city, beyond the skyscrapers. She heard and saw the strong winds blowing up a storm in the far suburbs. The humans were blown apart and their homes were ripped apart by the wind. Then there was a blinding flash. Anastasia gasped and looked away as even this far away and with skyscrapers in the way the light still blinded her. As the light faded and her vision returned a strong scent blew into her nostrils... Deer! She looked ahead and gasped. The Deer she'd been hunting was now laying in the city! She was downwind from the beast. She couldn't believe her luck! But she kept still, using her downwind position to her advantage along with the skyscrapers as visual cover. The Deer woke up and almost immediately it noticed the houses and humans below. Annoyed the beast began to smash it's hooves down on everything in range. Homes and people were squished flat under the Deer's Hooves. Anastasia resisted the urge to roar. She had to act and fast!

She couldn't move forwards, at least not without carving a trail of bloody destruction herself. She reached for her bow and pulled an arrow out of her quiver. She nocked the arrow onto the bow and raised it. Taking aim she drew back. Her thick muscles rippling as she prepared to fire the arrow. The humans on her and around her paws had a clear view of her. They to saw the chaos the Deer was causing and could see the Tiger was aiming at the Deer. Anastasia slowly unsheathed her claws. The humans at her feet leapt aside as Sixteen razor sharp claws sunk into the tarmac. Anchoring her in place. She'd been polite and given the humans time to move away from her claws. She had no intention of skewing them with her claws. She was ready to fire. But the skyscrapers were still in the line of fire. The gaps between them very narrow but wide enough for an well aimed arrow...

Anastasia breathed steadily as she prepared to released the arrow. Her aim had to be spot on or she'd destroy the humans tall structures and if she spooked the Deer. It would cause more destruction. She growled and released the arrow...
1141111211223.title: Giant prey and equally giant archery

11411112112231.content:
The instant she loosed the arrow it let off a mighty sonic boom thanks to its huge size and the speed it was launched. To Anastasia it sounded no different to normal. The humans all cringed at the loud boom that assaulted their ears. Windows for several blocks were shattered by the shockwaves. The arrow flew straight and true. Humans in the skyscrapers gawping at the huge Tigress aiming their way leap back as she released the arrow right at the Deer the other side. The arrow whizzed right on by, missing the skyscrapers though it shattered windows and cracked many more as it passed. No one fell, having all backed up in time. The Deer was unaware, it was about to stomp out a crowd of humans when the arrow struck it right in the side of the head. Instantly killing the beast. Blood sprayed from the wound, soaking nearby buildings and humans. The Deer's lifeless body wobbled and collapsed. Demolishing a line of single storey shops. No one was killed, all the shops having been abandoned as people fled from the Deer's rampage.

Anastasia clenched her fist and grinned. ''Perfect shot!'' She laughed. ''See that humans?!'' She asked looking around at her passengers and the people at her feet. They all were a little dazed, but when they saw her shot had been perfect they cheered. Their cheers music to her ears. She couldn't help notice the effect her arrow had had on windows. ''hmm, at my new size that must of been supersonic to them. Sorry about that little ones! Though I've saved you from the Deer and given myself a meal'' she apologised. But the humans of course couldn't understand her. She now had to go and retrieve her kill...

She steadily lifted a paw forwards as she headed deeper into the city. She was very mindful of the humans at her feet. They watched in awe as she stepped carefully over them as she headed for the Deer. Whilst she would stop to let people get clear vehicles were fair game. Many were crushed under her thick soft pads. She felt a little guilty, but there was no other way. 'At least I'm not squishing the little ones' she thought as she walked into the city. But the buildings were getting taller and closer together. She hoped she could make it through or she'd have to turn back and walk the long way round.
11411112112231.title: Perfect aim!

choices: The smell has attracted a giant predator
The smell has attracted another Taur
114111121122311.content:
She stopped and paused briefly as she studied the building before her. It was a a small office block. Fairly slim and not to tall. It would be a tight fit, but it should fit between and under her belly. She was still having to straddle buildings to fit her paws on the streets. 'Here goes' she thought as gingerly she stepped forwards. Her thick legs brushed the side. But didn't do any damage. Though those inside the building had quite the view. The windows would suddenly be cover in a curtain of soft thick fur. Brave people opened windows, strands of soft fur poked through. Even braver people reached out and stroked the fur. Both sides of the building were given the same view as her thick legs passed either side. Down on the ground people on the ground floor who had ran in from the streets got an different view. Several of the runners had abandoned their cars outside, realising they wouldn't get away from the approaching giant Tigress.

Looking out they saw a great shadow consume the street and cars. The street lights even lit up as their sensors mistook Anastasias shadow for night. Apart from screams, honks the most obvious sound was the soft thump of her paws. Though throughout the building her fur could be heard brushing along the sides. Though the view outside soon changed further as a colossal paw descended, slowly. The thick pink pads covered in crushed vehicles and tarmac. The odd crushed car peeled off and bits of tarmac rained down. The paw reached the lampposts They slowly bent downwards under it. But then a man ran out of an alley opposite under the paw! The people screamed as did the man as it looked like he was going to be turned into paste. But the paw stopped inches above him. A grumble from above echoed throughout the building. The man quickly ran back up the alley. The paw continued it's descent. Crushing cars as with a thud it landed flat on the street. Sinking in a few feet. Then it lifted, leaving a small paw shaped crater. The people's who cars were now sheet metal cried in despair. But they daren't move for soon a hind paw appears and lands near to the first, destroying more of the street.

Above Anastasia's belly was rubbing over roof top equipment. She moaned as it ticked her belly. Hidden in her thick fur were four teats for feeding young. They easily pushed over and crushed ventilation fans and ducts. Antenna were bent down by her belly, but apart from that she'd not damaged any more of the building. Once she cleared it she sighed in relief. ''Not so bad, felt quite good actually, though that man nearly got himself squished'' she said to herself as she looked back to study the building. Though the streets were wrecked, what more could she do? Now she had smaller one storey shops to pass over. The shops had massive car parks. Which made it easy for her to walk through She continued to step on cars without hesitation. Though she was sniffing ahead to make sure none were occupied.

She stepped over the occupied ones. Her heavy paw steps set off alarms and made many cars jump up and smash into each other. The alarms hurt her ears. She growled ''Oh my how do you little ones put up with that racket?!'' She asked her passengers. They shivered in fear. ''Why are... Ah! I didn't growl at you!'' She apologised. But the humans did not understand her. Though her soft expression made it clear she wasn't being aggressive to them. The humans worked it out - the alarms were annoying her. She resisted the urge to swipe at cars with alarms. There were humans around her and she didn't want to squish any. She sighed and tried to ignore the alarms.

She had one more hurdle. Ahead were many office buildings as tall as her. She stopped to study the area. It was a big walk to get around involving many smaller buildings like the office block she'd just walked over. It was either awkwardly walk over the smaller buildings. Or she could jump over the bigger ones. She looked beyond the tall buildings. their was the cities football (soccer) stadium. the pitch was big enough for her to stand on. But the surrounding stands and office buildings meant her leap would have to be perfect. She sniffed the air and tried to pick out any scents from the stadium. She couldn't smell any humans in there. She had to do it...

''I going to jump little ones, you may want hold on tight!'' She told her riders. They looked at her confused. She reached back and pulled at her fur. The humans got the idea and grabbed a hold of her fur. 'Here goes' she thought as she she squatted down. Being in a car park she had nothing under her but cars. Her belly didn't come low enough to crush them. She'd made long leaps before, but not from a stand still. She looked back to make sure no humans were behind her. Then with a snarl she pushed off. Her huge paws pushed hard against the ground. Tearing up four large chunks of tarmac that flew back and crushed hundreds of (empty) cars. Her massive body sailed up and over the office buildings. The humans within ducking as her body sailed by, rattling the windows. She passed the second row and third. Her paws brushed the roof, but luckily only took out more air conditioning units and ducts. She arced down over the stadium. Her four paws ready to absorb the impact, her toes spread out as with a mighty thump she slammed down on the pitch. The impact cracked the stadium and blew apart the chairs. Her four paws sunk deep into the pitch, completely ruining it. But she'd done it! ''Never jumped like that before!'' She laughed, looking at her white faced riders. ''Aww come on, didn't you like it?'' she asked. One of the humans, a bit of an adrenaline junkie cheered ''woo! Again!'' He laughed. She took his cheers as a collective yes to her question.

But now she was clear of the taller buildings. All that remained was a small hop out of the stadium and a walk down a few streets. She made sure there was no one outside before hopping out. Smashing four deep craters into the stadiums car park. Alarms going off once again ''eurgh!'' She sighed as she walked over to her kill...
114111121122311.title: A squeeze and office building hurdles.

choices: Fire engines putting out a fire
1141111211223111.content:
She looked at the Deer and the surrounding area it had trampled. She clenched her fists and growled when she saw all the humans squashed bodies. She walked up to the Deer and planted a paw on it's belly. Unsheathing her claws she pushed into the corpse. ''Fucker!'' She growled as she grabbed her arrow and pulled it out. She studied the arrow, it was intact though covered in blood and gore. She carefully released her tongue, a great pink slab of muscle covered in rasping spines and licked the arrow clean. Placing it back into her quiver. She squatted down and unsheathed the claws on her hands. She sliced open the Deer and reached in. Pulling out vital organs which she greedily shoved into her mouth. She barely chewed her powerful throat muscles constantly working as she devoured tons and tons of fresh Deer. The humans on her back had a front row view of her feast. On the ground humans that had came to find survivors in the Deer's carnage (or loot) gawped up at her as she tore into the Deer. She may have saved them from the Deer but it was still a terrifying sight. Her large fangs on show as she took in chunks of meat. Her muzzle was covered in blood.

But she was not done yet! She thrust her head down into the deer as she snapped up massive chunks. To the humans it looked like an ostrich with its head in the sand. Loud rips, tears and gulps echoed throughout the area as she feasted. She was going to eat almost every part, apart from the bones. It barely took ten minutes. All that was left was a pile of bones. She backed up and patted her belly. Belching loudly she groaned ''Ah, that's better!'' She looked at her bloody hands and fore paws. ''Need to wash'' She looked back at her riders and smiled. Her face still splattered in blood as were her fangs. This made them cower she gasped ''Woops! Sorry little ones!'' She wiped at her muzzle, to clear off some blood. But it was no good, she had to wash herself. She look around for a source of water...

She spots...
1141111211223111.title: A messy eater

11411112112231111.content:
Her eyes set upon the public swimming pool. The cities pools were huge and all outdoors. It consisted of multiple pools of various sizes and depths. One of the pools even had three tall waterslides. There were hot tubs, cool pools, a tidal wave pool and even rapids. A large complex with lockers, changing rooms and swimwear shops stood next to the pools. Anastasia grinned ''Ah, perfect! Not to far and it look big enough'' she headed on over. The pools were near the suburbs and fairly easy to reach. She casually walked on over. Still taking care not to squish any humans. As she neared the pools she could see they were occupied. By hundreds of humans! The pools were not just surrounded by the complex but by tall palm trees to give it the tropical look. This blocked the view of her. No one seemed to be aware of her presence within the city. The complex faced away from where she and the Deer had been. Their presence had knocked out phone lines and reports on the radio of giant beasts appearing all over ignored as fantasies.

As she neared the pools she could finally be seen by the swimmers as well as heard and felt. Despite her best efforts her paws still let off small tremors. The water rippled with every step as her shadow started to wash over the pools. She waved at the humans below ''Hi cuties! Mind if I join in a little?'' She asked. Her friendly greeting and question was not seen as that. Her blood soaked muzzle, hands and paws had quite an effect. Screams of terror filled her ears as the humans swam wildly away from her. She sighed and reached down into the first pool. Dipping her hand in the water she splashes about to clean her hand. The once pristine water turned a shade of red. ''Sorry about this'' she muttered as she washed her other hand. Moving to a adjacent pool she used her hands to splash her face. But she was polite, waiting for the humans to get clear.

Her muzzle clean and another pool turned red all she has left were her paws. She saw an artificial waterfall. She placed her toes in the stream letting it cascade over her toes and wash off the blood. Soon she had washed off. But the humans were still running away or swimming out of the surrounding pools. She sighed ''Come down, don't let me interrupt your swimming!'' She really didn't want to spoil the humans swims. If anything she wished to join in, though she was way to big. But she could still play with them. She looked back under herself to make sure it was clear. Then she laid down the messy pools were covered under her belly but half the pools were still clear and uncovered. She reached out with her hands and blocked off the entrances/exits. Terrified people tripped before her hands and looked at her in terror. She smiled softly and began to chuff at the humans. ''Aww... Come down I won't hurt you!'' She whined.

Her riders started yelling at the others. She reached back and let them climb onto her hand. She brought them forwards and dropped them in the pool before her. They splashed about in the water and shouted to the others. ''Come on, she's friendly!'' They cried. Anastasia playfully splashed her humans with water, using one finger. They splashed her back. She kept chuffing away as she played with 'her' humans. Trying to show the others she meant no harm. She had uncovered the exits. Preferring to let the humans decide on their own whether to stay or not...
11411112112231111.title: Washing and playing at the swimming pool

114111121122311111.content:
Anastasia chose to ignore the other humans and focus on her riders. Maybe that would show the other humans she wasn't a threat. She continued to use her fingers to playfully splash 'her' humans. She even lifted them up and let them dive off into the water. She ignored the screams of the fleeing humans, though she did feel a little sad all she could do was prove through her actions that she really was just friendly and quite curious. Her eyes lit up when other humans came back and cautiously entered the water. She continued to chuff as she studied the other humans. These humans wore little clothing and their mostly bare bodies fascinated her. ''How on earth can you little ones cope with so little fur?'' She asked. Cocking her head as she intently looked at them. She'd never seen a species with such tiny amounts of fur. She had to have a closer look. She carefully scooped up a swimmer. He cried out as he was plucked up out of the water by one of her fingers. He rolled onto her palm as she lifted him to her face for a closer look. He sat up and gasped as he stared right into her face. her nostrils flared as she took in his scent. Her eyes studying him all over. The man fainted. She gasped and poked him. ''Ah he's not dead, just pretending! How silly!'' She muttered. She carefully poked him some to get a feel of his skin. 'How unusual. Such a strange feeling so smooth and cold' she thought as she finally lowered the man and placed him beside the pool. Some other humans ran over and helped him.

She focused on the pool once again. More humans were swimming. Though she could tell they were uneasy. None came near her. Only her riders did so. They seemed to try and encourage the others to come closer to little avail. 'Oh well, at least they aren't just running away' she thought as she decided to just stay and watch the humans swim. Her head rested on her hands as for twenty minutes she laid by the pool. She looked up and around the area. She wanted to go and explore elsewhere. She stood up, Her wet belly having been over some pools dripped large quantities of water. She backed up steadily so not to alarm the humans who all gawped up at her as she rose to her full height. The water pouring from her belly like a great waterfall sounded like thunder as it splashed into the adjacent pools. She wanted to give her body a shake, making sure no humans were either side of her she gave her belly a quick shake. Flinging water either side of her. Harmlessly splashing surrounding buildings and sweeping away a few abandoned vehicles. Her sword nearly slipped out of its scabbard, but she quickly grabbed the weapon and pushed it back in.

Unfortunately on seeing her grab the sword the humans had the wrong impression. Those that had joined in the pool screamed and swam away and ran. ''I was only shaking off!'' She cried. Her words nothing but a loud roars and growls. She sighed as noticed 'her' humans remained behind. She crouched down and offered her hand for them to climb on. Which they did. She held them before her face and chuffed. ''At least you guys know I'm friendly and quite curious to be honest'' The humans gibbered to each other and her. She didn't understand a word 'such a funny language!' She thought as she returned the humans to her back. With her humans back on her it was time to move on. So many things in the city interested her. Though it was so difficult to reach places thanks to her size, the narrow streets and the humans themselves. So far she'd killed none and she had no intention of increasing that number. She tried to ignore the screams throughout the city, why the humans were so scared of her baffled her. Surely they would be pleased to have such a big friendly and powerful warrior protected them? Then it dawned, it might also be her giant powerful form that scared them. All she could do was continue to be as careful and friendly as possible it seems.

So she's heading for the next place that had caught her interest...
114111121122311111.title: New attraction at the Swimming pool

1141111211223111111.content:
Her eyes set upon a large L shaped building surrounded by fields and sports pitches. What really interested her was the humans coming in and out of the building. There were smaller and clearly juveniles. ''How cute!'' She giggled as she made her way to the school. Now the school was the largest secondary school in the city. Easily it had just over 2000 pupils and teachers. Now on her arrival the pupils had been instructed to stay put. The roads already dangerous with fleeing cars driving wildly. Many disobeyed or were picked up by parents. But at least 1500 remained in the building. The giant Tiger stomping about the city was a mile away, laid over the swimming pool. Now that the roads had quietened somewhat and the beast was occupied the head master gave the order to evacuate the school. The schools buses parked up were boarded and pulled away as the Tiger was still looking away and occupied with the pool. But when the beast stood up and looked this way panic ensured as it headed this way...

Anastasia watched as the juvenile humans along with adults boarded long metal vehicles. Many of which already were moving away through the streets. ''How interesting. I have to have a closer look!'' She said to herself as she stepped over buildings that were in her path. Luckily there was so small and easy to step over without incident. The streets fairly quiet by now as most humans had fled or were hiding within the buildings. 'How nice for them to clear me a path' she thought as she stepped over the last building between her and the school. She stomped across the playing fields. Leaving great deep prints as her paws sunk into the soft earth. Her eyes fixed on the buses. She ignored the parked ones, as on her approach the humans had fled into the school. She went for the closest moving bus full of juveniles. She grinned as she walked on after it, steadily catching up thanks to her huge size. ''Aww No need to run!'' She giggled as she chased down the bus. It turned into a street that was blocked by crashed cars. Trying to back up it was to late...

Anastasia planted her paw on the junction behind the bus, trapping it. Reaching down her fingers wrapped around the bus as she lifted it into the air. The door opened and a person went to jump. ''No you don't!'' She gasped as she slid a finger to block the door. She didn't want them to jump out and kill themselves. Within the bus the screams of the humans filled her ears. She sighed as she held them before her face. She chuffed at them ''Hi cuties! I only want to say hello!'' Her friendly greeting didn't seem to work. She studied them intently, 'oh my they are adorable!' She thought as she had a close look. She wished they would calm down and trust her. She held her free hand under the bus and slid her finger off the door. Immediately humans jumped out, into her hand. She quickly covered the door and dropped the humans on her back. Looking back she grinned as she saw her humans intervene. They seemed to calm the juveniles down. She repeated the process, until the bus's passengers were all safely on her back.

Carefully setting the bus down so not to look aggressive she looked back at her newest riders. Some had fainted. Others seemed to argue but quite a few were holding tablets out and drawing her again. She had to give them a pose! Once again she unsheathed her great sword and held it aside, showing off the great weapon. ''Like this little ones?'' She asked as they went silent. Most in shock. Though the adults riding her were unfazed ''Relax, she's just posing for you with your phones!'' They laughed. This seemed to help prevent a panic. Anastasia meanwhile grinned broadly. Nothing better than a bit of showing off! Her sword was of great pride to her. She gave the humans plenty of time to draw her. Oblivious to the fact she was being recorded, not drawn. Her words of growls and snarls like static on the phones microphones. Another side effect was the juvenile humans started to pet her. Sending waves of pleasure through her body. 'At last some trust!' She thought happily as the children warmed up to her.

But after ten minutes and as she prepared to sheath her weapon she picked up something. Her nostrils flared as she smelt a threat approaching. Her eyes scanned the horizon. She went as still as a statue as she growled as the threat appeared...
1141111211223111111.title: Making little friends

choices: Still all running away in terror!
11411112112231111111.content:
She recognised the scent. A Kodiak Brown Bear Taur! Now these were nearly twice her size. But not only was their increased size a problem their equally arrogant and egotistical attitudes made them extremely unpopular. ''Fuck!'' She growled. She'd had a few run in with Bear Taurs before. Though she'd always tried to avoid them she had a fight with a few. She'd won, just. Bear Taurs will use their bodies and their weapons in battle. They typically used Hammers and a Swords. Disarming a Bear Taur was usually enough to get them to go away. Nothing embarrassed the arrogant Ursines more than dropping their weapons in a fight. Not only was it a Bear, but a male even worse!

She now saw the Bear Taur. He was charging right at her. His massive plantigrade feet were three times as big as hers. As were his claws. His sword was drawn as he reached the edge of the city. He didn't slow his pace. His massive feet slammed down on houses. vehicles and humans. ''Stupid measly bugs!'' He snarled as he ripped through the suburbs. Anastasia roared at him in extreme anger. Her roar was a terrifying bellow. Blowing out windows and making her riders cower in terror. The Bear's wanton destruction, stinking attitude and the scent of her friends fear incensed her greatly! She didn't move, not stooping as low as to smash up the little ones homes. She unsheathed her claws and held her sword defensively before her. She continued to growl as the huge Bear stopped before her and grinned down at her.

''Aww. The little kitty is angry!'' He laughed. ''You sick bastard! Attacking those weaker than yourself!'' She snarled. He snickered and slammed a foot down on a building. Easily demolishing it. ''They're just puny bugs. So weak and pitiful. You even have the disgusting things on your back. Let me get them for you!'' The Bear pulled at his sword and swung at her back. She quickly swung her sword and with a mighty clang the two swords slammed together. ''Bitch! I'll dice you up and stomp you up into a paste along with the bugs!'' The Bear roared as he pushed her sword back and swung at her. She deflected his swing. She swiped back but he blocked her. He swung again. She ducked and let the sword swing over her head. She grabbed his arm and pulled. He pulled away. Being large and far more powerful he lifted her up and chucked her back.

Anastasia gasped as she slid back, smashing through multiple buildings. ''Fuck!'' She growled as she looked down at demolished buildings. Though a quick sniff let her know they were empty. She quickly raised her sword as the Bear lunged at her. She blocked him. But she was having difficulty in moving. Usually she'd be moving to an fro but she didn't want to destroy the buildings or kill humans. But if she was to lose the Bear would destroy everything... She sniffed and looked around. Apart from the humans on her back the immediate area was human free. 'I'll have to be more aggressive. Hopefully the little ones will understand' She thought. But she also had to get the humans off her back, they weren't safe and were hindering her. She pushed the Bear back and with one leap back she landed by the school. She sat on the playing field sloping her back. ''Get off!'' She told her humans. They were already tumbling down her back and onto the ground. Her soft fur cushioning their falls.

Once the last human was off. She stood up and charged at the Bear. ''You ugly fat brute!'' She mocked as she went. She tore through buildings and streets. her paw prints extra deep with her increased momentum. The Bear roared ''What did you say?!'' He charged at her. The two titans tore their way towards each other. Clouds of dust left in their wake. Burst water pipes sprayed water high into the air. But gas mains also burst, leaking the volatile gas into the surrounding area. Both Taurs had their swords ready. They reached other. Their swords smashed together in one mighty clang. Sparks flew as they ran past each other. Both skidding to a halt as they came around for another strike. Their paws completely annihilating everything they touched. By some luck the sparks had ignited gas. But all it would take was one spark in the right (or wrong) place...

They made another strike and pass. ''Fucking Cat! I'm far superior to you!'' Roared the Bear. Anastasia grinned ''Superior in weight, you fat bastard!'' The Bear roared again ''Take this!'' He pounded towards her with all his might. Anastasia stood her ground. She sunk her claws into the ground anchoring herself in place. The Bear bored down on her. Three blocks... Two blocks... She lifted her sword back. Exposing herself. ''That's it! Accept your fate!'' Mocked the Bear. One block... With a grunt she threw her sword at the Bear. He leapt and swung at it. With a clang sparks flied... Anastasia backed up as with a roar the gas ignited. The blast blinding and deafening as it consumed the whole block, including the Bear.

Anastasia Clenched her fist. ''Got you you bastard!'' She laughed. Before her the ball of fire rose leaving the area devastated. She sniffed the air. No human was in the area. 'Zero casualties' she thought proudly as she approached the wrecked block. The smoke though being thick still revealed the Bear was lying on his back, dazed. His fur singed all over. Great patches had burnt off revealing burnt flesh. Anastasia reached grabbed her bow and took aim. She fired into the Bears arms and legs. He roared in pain. She wasn't going to show mercy. The Bear was a cold blooded murderer and deserved none. She retrieved her sword then walked over to the Bear. ''You bit... Glurgh!'' His insult blocked off by her sword coming down into his throat. Blood poured from the wound and his mouth. Anastasia snorted and twisted the sword.

Planting a paw on the Bear she lifted her head and roared to the heavens. A victory cry. She looked around at the destruction and sighed. 'I had no choice...' She thought as she backed off the Bear and retrieved her arrows and blood soaked sword. She backed away from the Bear and headed back to the school. Panting heavily, she was little worn out from that. But she was more worried that the humans would be even more terrified of her. She reached the School and dropped to her belly on the playing field. Her humans were still there. They cheered and ran up to her. She smiled as they petted her legs and chest. Her sword she dropped nearby. Not wanting to sheath it whilst covered in blood or scare the humans. Her tail swished contently as she was petted and thanked by her humans. Nothing could be more rewarding to her.

''Aww thanks little ones. Sorry about the mess'' she apologised. She was so glad to have saved them from the Bear. She'd never killed one before, but he was asking for it. Whilst her humans were busy petting her she lifted her head to look for other inhabitants, just to see what they was up to...
11411112112231111111.title: Giant Sword Fight! Anastasia vs a Bear Taur

114111121122311111111.content:
She couldn't believe what she was seeing! Hundreds of humans were approaching her cheering and clapping! She'd never had so much praise in her entire life. She felt so warm and fuzzy inside. The Humans came up to her. She sprawled onto her side. Presenting her belly. Hundreds of hands brushed through her fur. She groaned contently and closed her eyes. Her entire body tingled with pleasure. She even felt them going in-between her toes. She was surely dreaming?! But it was no dream, she was really being petted all over by humans. She laid her head on her arm and let the humans massage her all over. 'So nice for them to finally trust me!' She thought happily. Thanks to the fight and massage she soon nodded off.

The humans continued to pet her. Many took selfies or videos as they stroked her all over. Many started to clean her paws. The pads coated in debris. On social media many videos were appearing of various giants and there antics. Anastasia's fight was already making hits. But so were more ominous ones. The Bear had already visited a small town. When he was done it wasn't a town anymore. A Anthro Wolverine and his pet dog, a German Shepherd were destroying another city. The dog bounced about crushing everything in its way. Another showed a Male Siberian Tiger Taur as he ripped apart a town. But he gently picked up humans and placed them on his back. A pack of Giant feral Wolves were captured tearing up a army base. Soldiers were slurped up whilst tanks were crushed under paws. It was looking dire for the humans. Maybe the only hope was to befriend a friendlier giant?

Anastasia slept on. The humans cleaning her paws and even her sword. She woke up after a few hours. The humans were still around her. But they were shouting at her and pushing on her muzzle. She yawned ''What.. What is it little ones?'' She asked. She soon realised what it was that agitated the humans so much...
114111121122311111111.title: Trust at last for Anastasia!

choices: Anthro Wolverine and his pet GSD
1141111211223111111114.content:
Looking at the sky she heard a strange roaring sound. The roar, it didn't sound natural. ''What kind of bird is making that noise?!' She thought. Her eyes set upon two flying 'birds'. But they were metal and not unlike the vehicles. She could smell humans in them. ''What sort of magic is this?!'' She gasped. To her planes, helicopters any flying equipment simply don't exist. She stood up and watched the planes as they headed right for her. Though they were thousands of feet high in the sky. They flew past, and began to circle around her. The humans around her ran for cover, but some gestured at her. ''What, what is it you want?'' She asked. She received gibberish and more wild gestures. ''Run?'' She asked. The humans who gestured pulled at her fur then ran. ''You do want me to run. don't you?'' She said. She stepped forwards, reaching down for her sword which the humans had cleaned for her. She was careful with her steps not to step on anybody. But even the humans who stayed behind and gestured at her now ran away. Even her riders were off. 'Somethings not right' she thought. As she started to walk away from the humans. Little did she know the jets were waiting for her to be alone...

Now that Anastasia was alone and there was no chance of innocent casualties the jets swung around and came at her. She noticed this. ''What.. Ah!'' She roared as the jets began to fire their cannons at her. The bullets couldn't penetrate her thick fur, but stung like crazy! Her thick leather straps also helped. The bullets not able to penetrate the tough leather. She had no choice but to run! She had a 'clear' path. Namely the path of destruction left by the Bear. She ran with all her might. Her massive paws pounded down violently upon the ground. Leaving deep prints, kicking up great clouds of dust and flinging debris everywhere. She sniffed ahead, making sure no humans were in her way. To her relief her path was clear. But the jets were easily keeping up. ''Go away!'' She roared as she ran. She was getting annoyed. She had tried to help and this is the response?! 'But the Bear had attacked. As did the Deer. Is there more giants out there up to no good?' she thought. This clamed her a little, it was a misunderstanding. But she couldn't explain to these flying vehicles or the humans operating them. She ran on...

She left the city and pounded across fields. Still the jets followed. But they stopped shooting at her. She sighed in relief. Thinking that they were just trying to get her out of the city. But they were going to step up the game. She heard a woosh and smelt flames then all of sudden with a great bang a small explosion went off against her back. It burnt her and made her cry out in pain as well as trip over. She'd just been hit by a missile. Her belly and upper torso slammed into the ground as she slid forwards churning up a great amount of earth. She came to a stop, she rolled over onto her her back. Her four paws in the air, a typical defensive Tiger position. ''Damn it! Piss off!'' She roared as she used her hand to grab a pile of earth and rocks. As the jets came in sight she tossed the earth/rocks up at them.

The jets, not expecting this tried to pull away but it was two late. Boulders and chunks of mud smash into them. Tearing off the wings and mud was ingested into the engines, destroying them. With their planes crippled the two pilots had no choice but to eject. Anastasia clenched her fist in victory as she hit the 'birds' and crippled them. She saw two humans get ejected from each one. They were attached to great clothes that helped them float. She rolled over and stood up. Shaking off the dirt in her fur. She looked at her back. Apart from a few singed strands of fur she was okay. The missile had a proximity detonator, so it exploded near her not directly on her. But now she had the pilots to deal with. She stepped beneath them as they floated closer to her. She stared silently at them as they descended.

Once close enough she reached up for them. They tried to move away but couldn't do much but float downwards. She brought them down before her muzzle. They wore strange helmets that hid their faces. ''So, you thought you could attack me and get away with it?'' She asked sternly. The pilots just heard a serious of snarls. Her sharp fangs on full show with each word/snarl. They backed up from her. She grinned. ''There's no escape, you know.'' She giggled as they reeked of fear. ''Relax, I'm not going to hurt you. But you do need a punishment. Now what should I do with you naughty little buggers?'' She muttered. She was the forgiving type, but she also believed in justified punishments. She looked back and grinned. ''I have it, a place were you'll be fine, but uncomfortable. Just like what you did to me!''

She used her free hand to reach back and undo a strap . Whilst she had leather straps that held her bags, water bottles and scabbard she also had one that went up over her backside, covering her privates and tailhole. Whenever she needed to relief herself one buckle was all she had to release to expose her bits. She released the buckle, revealing her two holes. Holding the strap level she brought the two pilots down and placed them on the thick leather. They gasped when they saw where they was. Her vagina a great black slit. Above her tailhole a puckering pink ring. Her musk filled their nostrils. She giggled ''Many a male would love to be where you are. Now you can think of what caused you to be placed here!'' She pulled the strap up and buckled it up. Trapping the two pilots against her pussy. She groaned as they struggled. ''All you're doing is tickling me cuties!'' She laughed as she started to walk on. She couldn't deny they felt great down there, enough to let them off. But not until they'd given her at least half an hour of pleasure...

So she walked on into the countryside. She sniffed the air and picked up the scent of another giant. She changed course to meet the giant. Now the giant is one of the ones mentioned in the previous chapter, caught on camera and put on social media.
1141111211223111111114.title: Anastasia vs two Jets

11411112112231111111142.content: The scent was familiar. ''A male!'' She gasped. Now usually she'd only seek out a male when she was in heat. But given this current situation she had to go meet him. 'I hope he's not picking on the little ones' she hoped. She didn't want her species name to be sullied. The thought of the Bear made her snarl. It was his fault the humans trapped against her pussy had attacked. She let the snarl fade. She decided to be positive. The two humans still struggled down under. 11411112112231111111142.title: Going to meet a male Siberian Tiger Taur

114111121122311111111421.content:
She saw the male like her had humans upon his back. He was going slow, taking care not to step on people. She sighed in relief. She hadn't realised at first but just outside the town was the corpse of a Cow Taur. A arrow sticking out of its neck matched the arrows in the males quiver. Hoof prints indicated the Cow had like the Bear had been trampling the town. In the hoof prints were squished humans. She focused on the male, unlike her he would reach down and pull roofs off buildings then reach in and pull out humans. ''You're safe with me little ones!'' He'd say before moving on and opening the next building. Anastasia decided to walk down to him. She studied him intently. He was the same size and build as her, she was a very large female. Also like her he had a great sword and bow. Bags and water bottles hung opposite his sword. Unlike her though his backside was exposed. His large balls and small sheath fully on show. 'What a beast!' She thought admiring his goods.

He suddenly turned and looked at her. He snarled and drew his sword. He'd been so occupied with the humans he'd not noticed her. ''Stay there! You won't attack them with me here!'' He threatened. Anastasia resisted the urge to draw her sword. ''I have no intention of attacking them. I was coming to make sure you wasn't attacking them!'' She replied. He snorted ''Clearly not! I've already caught this Cow stomping them out. She found out the hard way.'' Anastasia shrugged ''I had to take down a Bear and feral Deer. They both were trashing the little ones buildings!'' The male laughed ''You seriously took down a Bear? How?!'' He didn't sound convinced. ''I used the little ones things to my advantage, some magical gas that explodes when touched by a spark. Boom! He was blown up and I finished him off!'' The Male still didn't look convinced. ''Have you proof?'' Anastasia growled ''Look. I killed the Bear and saved the little ones. I even had them on my back like you at one point!'' She gestured at her back. He growled ''where are they then?!'' Anastasia sighed ''I had to release them.
