Anastasia - Coat like a Jaguar. She is used in conformation shows. Her mane is always braided and her fur is kept in top condition. A bit full of herself and loves to strut about showing off to others.

Eris - A white furred and blacked strip Tiger coat. She is a guardian Cat. She often looks after children. She loves little ones and is very tolerant of their antics.
115132.title: Female Grand Cat

11531.content:
So A Dragon? Feral Bodied only these beasts are giants, even amongst the other inhabitants of their world.

Western Dragon - Four legs, massive bat like wings, horns, covered in scales, a long thick tail and breathes fire.

Eastern Dragon - Four legs, long noodle like body, horns, covered in fur, long tendril like whiskers can control air and water.

Wyvern - Similar to the western Dragon. But has only two hind legs and 'walks' with it's wings. Think Smaug or Drogon from Game of thrones.
11531.title: Dragon

115311.content: So a western Dragon? Covered in blood red scales our Dragon is a...
115311.title: Western Dragon

1153112.content:
Pyro, a 8000 year old Dragon was flying high over his territory. He was fully grown and easily had a wing span of 1000ft, a body length of 500ft and stood close to 100ft tall at his shoulders. His lair was massive cave packed full of treasure that he stole from the Anthro and Taur creatures that dared enter his land. He even raided neighbouring Dragons, stealing their hoards and slaying them if they got in his way. Many towns and villages would also be pillaged, the populace devoured and burnt to the ground. Extremely vain, arrogant and full of himself he cared only about himself. He often had short naps (a few decades a go!) When he awakened always was their new villages to raid. Though any that dared enter his cave in his slumber would face his fury.

So as he flew along eyeing up a new village to raid he snarled as without warning a bright light before him filled his vision and pulled at him. ''What is this?!'' He bellowed. Blasting at the light with his mighty flames. ''Nothing can control me!'' He defiantly roared as he was pulled into the light...

As quickly as it happened the light was gone as was the pulling effect. He was still high in the sky. But below the scene was different in sight and smells. ''What is this?!'' He grumbled. His nostrils flared as he took in the new scents and his keen eyes focused on the place below. He was flying high over a great modern city, which he'd never seen before. On his world they were still in the medieval ages. Technology, electricity, guns, planes... No such thing existed on his world.

But apart from being taken to a new world his size was now five times greater. His wingspan 5000ft, his body 2500ft long and he stood 500ft at the shoulder. He hovered high over the city as he pondered on what to do next...
1153112.title: Meet Pyro, the old male Dragon

choices: Investigate the humans, who were still fleeing out in droves
Sees the colorful cars as pretty “treasures” and tries to “collect” them
11531121.content:
Having been teleported away by some magic? As he was about to raid a village? That was not something Pyro was about to put up with lightly! He had no idea what strange crystal formations lay underneath him, all he knew was that they were about to become the victim of his wrath, whether it was their fault or not!

He arced his flight path downward, aiming his super massive body at the delicate looking spires. The people in the buildings felt their mouth’s drop, as they couldn’t even comprehend what was happening. Fortunately for them, those humans didn’t need to be confused long, as the massive scaly body took them out! With a violent crash, Pyro smashed into the city below! The momentum of his landing carried him multiple city blocks, easily ripping through them with his belly and massive claws!

Seconds after he landed, he swung his massive tail into more of the strange objects. It was able to slice through the buildings like tissue paper! The shattered concrete, furniture, and a whole heap of injured humans were sent crashing down onto a different section of city, creating yet more destruction! He stretched his massive wings and let out an enormous roar! Tops of structures were easily ripped off by his mighty wings, and the shiny surfaces of the objects exploded from the might of his voice! Pyro grinned to himself, these objects were proving to be quite the satisfying target for his current rampage! Not wanting to lose any “momentum”, he started flattening buildings with his front legs, kicking others over with his hind legs, while also giving structures more hearty swings with his thick red tail.

To say the population in that area of city was in a panic, would be and understatement! The dragon had landed and started rampaging so fast, people didn’t even know what to run from! Those within the immediate dragons reach didn’t have to worry much, as their lives were quickly ended. However, those a few blocks away began to perform the natural human behavior, of running in a panic and flooding into the streets.

It only took Pyro a few minutes to completely flatten the surrounding buildings deep into the dirt. Still enraged and without anything immediately near him to wreck, the dragon instinctually changed to another form of attack. He raised his majestic head, as glowing embers began to pour out of his maw. With a great blast, Pyro released a 400ft tall wall of fire! The massive stream of flames were send to the intact sections of city all around him. The pressured fire was able to easily work it’s way between the buildings, naturally taking the path of least resistance. The crowds of humans fleeing on the streets were instantly burned alive! All that remained were charcoal shaped husks, roughly in human shape. Those who had stayed inside the buildings were far from safe, as entire skyscrapers were set ablaze! There was no escape for the humans! Despite Pyro having being completely (yet briefly) surrounded by human creatures, he was so enthralled with his rampage, he had not noticed them!

After a few more moments of crushing, stomping, swinging and burning, Pyro was soon starting to calm down. Within that short time period, he had taken out about a square mile of downtown core. “Woof, I needed that! That was quite the satisfying romp, if I do say so myself”, he said proudly. Pyro then looked around the area, as his curiosity began to return to him. The buildings surrounding the dragon were completely ablaze, their smoke blocked out the view of the rest of the city. “Hmm, now lets see exactly what we are dealing with…”, Pyro said out-loud, as he began to walk forward, trampling over what little of the structures remained. The dragon then left the crushed and chard ruins. Unbothered by the flame’s heat, he plowed right through the burning area. He was soon about to explore a “fresh” part of this strange environment.
11531121.title: Letting off some Fiery Steam!

choices: Curiosity - He explores the building(s) further
115311212.content:
Leaving the completely destroyed downtown area Pyro's blazing eyes now set upon far smaller buildings. Mainly shops, restaurants and other small businesses. The streets were packed with fleeing humans and cars. The cars struggled to get through horns blared and the sound of metal crunching as collisions constantly took place. Now to Pyro the bright cars were the size of and looked like many precious gems. ''Oh my, what plentiful treasure to plunder!'' He grinned broadly, exposing his razor sharp fangs. Light grey smoke puffed from his nostrils and from his mouth. The grey smoke indicating he was in a far better mood. Dark black smoke or even flames meant one thing, he was pissed! The humans did not know any of this and nor did it really matter. Pyro has seen the humans so far as nothing but mere bugs. Their city a natural crystal formation that they had nested within.

He brings one of his clawed feet over the closest cars. His sharp talons curled around them. Tearing right into the street with ease and below severed water and gasp pipes. Countless humans were torn apart by his claws as he lifted a clump of cars and street to his face. Studying the cars, humans and street he grumbled. ''Oh my! I've never seen things like this. But these aren't gems, but metal, earth and bugs!'' He opened his mouth and tossed the cars, humans and chunk of street in. Sealing his jaws he swished about and used his slimy tongue to push out humans and road. The Vehicles he swallowed. A Dragon always carried plunder by swallowing it. Regurgitating it later at their hoard. Most humans were crushed within his mouth. When he swallowed his 'treasure' he had a taste of the 'bugs.' He groaned ''Hmm... These bugs don't taste that bad, for bugs that is!'' He said to himself as he tore up another section of road, collecting 'treasure.'

As he walked forwards he stepped on one of the surrounding buildings. He roared in surprise as his foot crashed right on through! ''The fuck?! They are hollow?! What sort of crystal is hollow?!'' He boomed. He lifted his foot out of the building, a electronic store and peered in the hole. Of course the crushed roof covered a small section of the store but his eyes set up TV's, computers, Radios... The power was still working, so some TV's still played as did music on radios. Pyro stared down at store, listening to the TV's and radios. The look on his face one of deep thought...

So how does Pyro react to his new discovery?
115311212.title: Collecting treasure

choices: Tosses it around the city, trying to break it open
Uses his fire, at the risk of melting the gold within
1153112121.content:
Pyro looked upon the rows of lit up TV’s. “Oh! What treasure is this now? It sparkles all on its own!”, he said, as the colors of the TV’s glistened into his eyes. Taking a large claw, he gripped a fistful from the big screen TV section. Much to Pyro’s annoyance, the beautiful colors quickly turned dark! He then grumbled, looking at his open claw. “What's this?! Gems that fade away when plucked?...Hmmm, well at least they still have a sheen to them”. Despite the TV’s being off, they still looked like black gemstones to him, sparkling in the light. This helped in easing Pyro’s thin temper. The dragon then opened his massive claw, dumping tens of thousands of dollars worth of televisions into his gullet. Multiple humans were also taken along with them, but the dragon figured they were not worth spitting out, they would be digested into nothing by the time he emptied his treasure.

As Pyro casually continued forward, grabbing another claw full of vehicles, he began to wonder, what other treasures lie within these crystals? With his curiosity peaked, he quickly turned to the next building, raised up his claws, and purposely ripped it open!

The humans inside were thrown into a panic, as the walls of the building were quickly replaced with a scaly red face. He just so happened to rip open a very posh bar/restaurant. Absolutely massive slabs of granite were used as the bar’s counter-top. Pyro’s eyes went wide as he spotted the smooth stone! He reached for it, and easily ripped the massively heavy object from the building. Humans hiding behind the counter were sliced by his sharp claws, but the dragon payed them little attention. Upon inspecting the hunk of stone, it soon too slid down into his belly.

Excited, Pyro quickly stomped to the next building. For now he was ignoring the vehicles, trampling them just as carelessly as the humans underfoot, the really good stuff was hidden inside the crystals!

Moving to the next building, Pyro eagerly ripped the entire roof and side off! Unfortunately, this caused the entire office building to become completely unstable! With a mighty crash the entire thing came down, burying and killing all within. Pyro waved the dust from his face and grunted, "Stupid thing!". He put the blame fully on the building, not himself! He was tempted to trash a bit more of the city, but was instead persuaded by the temptation of finding more treasures!

The following building he stomped over to, was actually mostly transparent? Cocking his head, the dragon wasted no time, as he smash down all the great planes of glass. Inside were more of those small, metallic gem shaped treasures he had been carelessly stomping out. However, these few were an incredibly striking color! Not only that, they were held up on pedestals, making them look like something to be worshiped! Pyro didn’t need any more convincing then that, as he greedily swallowed down all the super cars of the dealership.

The next few buildings were quite anticlimactic. They contained either nothing of interest, or had treasures that were too small to bother collecting. With a grunt he would treat the disappointing buildings to a hearty smack of his tail, crashing them into others, as they shattered into pieces.

However, one of the buildings he approached looked fairly fortified. Intrigued, he began to use his two great front claws to dig out the structure. Debris went flying behind him, killing many. He soon came to a very solid feeling object, more robust then anything he had encounter (crushed) so far. With a grunt, he lifted the large metal box free from the ruined structure. It was roughly the size of one of his claws. "Humph, I wonder if they’re trying to hide something good! Well it’ll do little to protect against me!". He then sniffed at the bank vault. “G-Gold! THERE’S GOLD INSIDE!”. Nothing can excite a dragon more then the shiny yellow metal, and Pyro was just so lucky to have found a rather large deposit of it.

“How vile!”, Pyro whined, “To think these disgusting insects must have been crawling...and probably defecating, on such wonderful treasures! And now to learn they were hiding away gold as well!” The large dragon then banged the metal box against the ground. It crushed multiple vehicles and people, but held firm. “ARGH, I need to find a way to open this infernal contraption!”.

His already thin patience were now being tested. How does Pyro try to open the vault?
1153112121.title: Shopping Hoard

11531121211.content:
Pyro's temper was starting to go. He started blowing out black smoke. A warning sign he was getting pissed! He smashed it down for the tenth time. Crushing hundreds of cars and humans in the process. ''DAMN IT OPEN!'' He roared. His roar shattered windows for miles around, cracked concrete, set off countless alarms and deafened thousands of humans. He was close to blasting forth his flames. But if he did that he might damage the precious gold. The thought of losing his gold brought his temper down. He lifted onto his hind legs and spread his mighty wings to steady himself. His heavy tail slammed down along a street, crushing cars and humans as well as shattering the surface. He growled and tossed the vault at very high speed across the city. With a mighty boom the vault went supersonic. Shattering yet more windows. It flew out into the suburbs and crashed down on a house. Now it's insane velocity meant it ploughed through the house with ease. Smashing through walls, floors and furniture it whizzed on going through ten houses before finally it stopped within a house. No humans had been hit by the vault though they of course looked in shock at the damage to their homes. The house with the vault now sat in the living room.

The humans screamed as they saw the massive Dragon that had being laying waste to the city take off. His mighty wings beating powerfully. The wing beats loud as thunder. The streets below were devastated by the beats, which were stronger than a category five hurricane! Pyro didn't care about the destruction caused by his wings. He flew over to were the vault had landed. Thousands of cars and humans were violently blown about as he flew overhead. He flew to the vault and landed over the house. His heavy impact caused the house to collapse, thanks to the damage already caused by the vault. ''Now! Let's see if it is open...'' He growled as he sunk his claws into the house and pulled out the vault... A dented and still sealed vault! Unluckily for Pyro the Vault was made of a metal stronger than diamond. The human 'bugs' were smarter than he thought...

''OH FOR FUCKS SAKE WILL YOU JUST OPEN FOR ME?!'' He roared as he blasted a long stream of flames onto adjacent houses. Obliterating them and cooking hundreds of humans alive. He lifted onto his hind legs and took off once more. Blowing debris everywhere that kindled the surrounding flames. The flames spread to more homes. The suburbs going up in a steady chain reaction. He flew straight up over the city. Until he was around twenty miles up. He could easily survive in the cold thin air. He lifted the vault over his head. ''NOW OPEN!'' He roared as with all his might he tossed the vault downwards, right at the city. It was easily travelling at many times the speed of sound. He dived after it. Though the vault outflew him...

The Vault slammed down on a mall. The impact blew apart the mall and left a deep debris filled crater. Hundreds of humans who were hiding were instantly killed as well as millions of products. Pyro landed by the crater and cleared away the debris to expose the vault which was...
11531121211.title: The worlds biggest Bank Robber

choices: Risk it and plunder more buildings!
Play it safe, go look for a den to unload!
115311212111.content:
Pure black smoke bellowed out of his nostrils. His razor sharp teeth were on full display as he growled. But all of that changed as he removed the last piece of debris, to see the annoying vault had finally opened! The massive round door had been torn off from the impact, and the gold was still safe inside!

His look of fury quickly faded into one of joy! The gold was his! Wasting no time, he picked up the bank vault and looked inside. The gold was split up into such small pieces, like grains of sand? No matter, there was still plenty of it! Strangely, Pyro also saw some kind of weird green parchment inside the box? Not wanting to swallow any of the green stuff, Pyro simply let out a small burst of flame, directly into the vault. The fire was small enough not to damage the gold, but large enough to burn all the other ‘garbage’ inside. Billions in cash were burned away as if they were nothing more then common weeds!

Once Pyro had confirmed that only the gold was left, he eagerly opened his toothy mouth wide and tilted the bank vault above it. Hundreds of millions in gold bars entered his maw before sliding down his slimy throat. The gold had been part of a large federal reserve for the city, and would have been quite useful to help repair all the destruction! Pyro made sure that not a single small bar was missed.

Finally satisfied, he carelessly tossed the ruined vault behind him, and then laid down on top of the destroyed mall. He stretched out his large, mighty legs, pushing aside great chunks of debris. The shattered mall was actually quite comfortable, despite the fact that many many broken human corpses laid just beneath the rubble. Pyro was of course unbothered by this. From his sprawled position, Pyro had a great view of the city. He could see multiple fires burning, as well as great sections of missing skyline. He could also smell the burning of the suburbs, which was quite a pleasant scent to him. Grey smoke puffed from his nostrils, as Pyro let out a great calm sigh. He could get use to living in a place like this!

Suddenly Pyro’s stomach let out a large gurgle! This caused the dragon to quickly rise to all fours, looking at his red belly concerningly. The sound was not caused by hunger, it was a sign that his digestive system was starting to get to work on his “treasure”. Soon, his body would naturally push his plunder further along his digestive track. All that excitement and flying around had expedited the digestive process. Pyro gingerly gripped his belly and swayed it from side to side. Audible crashing and destruction could be heard from within his thick, slimy walls, as the giant mess of vehicles, TV’s, gold, granite and half digested humans sloshed around. This gave Pyro a slight sigh of relief, he still had time!

Apart from the embarrassment, once a treasure has gone through a dragon’s bowels, it is never really the same again! Gems are permanently dulled, gold looses its sheen and overall the entire haul is ruined! No respectable dragon would ever have soiled plunder like that in their hoard! Plus, having such solid objects mixed in with one’s turds, can be quite unpleasant on the anus to say the least! Regrettably, Pyro had this happen to him a number of times, completely ruining the treasures he had collected from multiple villages. He was so angry, he ended up razing a half-dozen more! With these new and unique treasures sitting within his stomach, it would be quite the shame to have them ruined!

Does Pyro risk it to go collect more loot from other buildings or does he start to look for a new den to ‘unload’?
115311212111.title: Indigestion

choices: Took to long, he can't hold it in anymore!
1153112121112.content:
''I have no desire to tarnish my new treasure. I better find a safe place to stash it within. I can always come back later.'' He decided. Beating his wings he lifted off and looked for a place to stash his treasure... He flew other the city, looking for suitable places. Then he moved to the countryside. His eyes dashed about looking for somewhere suitable...

After nearly half an hour he...
1153112121112.title: Play it safe, go look for a den to unload!

choices: Go out to the same city/find a new one to plunder/explore/rampage
Take a few hours rest, but is rudely interrupted by something!
11531121211123.content:
The area underneath the soaring dragon was growing rocky and mountainous. However, to Pyro, the “mountains” look like nothing more then small rocky mounds. But more annoyingly, there were no caves in sight! Pyro’s smoke began to slowly fade from a light gray to a pitch black as time went on. His large stomach then gave out a rather large and concerning gurgle! “Oh No-no-no! Don’t you dare!”, Pyro shouted at himself! At this point, his eyes were frantically darting around, looking for anything he could use as a den!

Suddenly, as luck would have it, he spotted something particular in the great expanse of wilderness. A strange collection of “gems” were lined up neatly in a row. Pyro was perplexed by this. Was something, possibly from beyond, trying to lead him somewhere? Wasting no time, he lowered his altitude and began to follow the gridlock of vehicles. His great body was so low, that every flap sent hundreds of tightly packed cars flying in all directions.

The main highway had been packed with traffic as everyone within the metropolis and surrounding area was trying to escape! While the highway was multiple lanes, everything came to a crawl when traffic had to funnel into an absolutely massive tunnel! It was carved through the largest mountain in the area. The tunnel was an impressive 10 miles long, but only included two lanes of traffic within. Multiple fights had broken out at the base of the tunnel, as many vehicles tried to cut their way in.

The current arguments were cut quite short, as the bickering humans were turned into a fine paste as Pyro made his sudden landing! Carelessly crushing the vehicles beneath him, Pyro stuck his large head inside the tunnel. Amazed, he could see it was lit up, and chock full of the gems! Pulling his head free, Pyro thought to himself, “humph, I guess this is how the insects collect their treasures? Burrowing into the rock?”. Pyro usually wasn’t interested in how his treasures were made, he only cared to steal them after others had done all the hard work to create them. But he had never heard of bugs doing this type of behavior? A quite large gurgle of his stomach quickly reminded Pyro that he was running out of time! “AH! Umm yes, this will do nicely as a den!”, he quickly blurted out in response. However, it was quite obvious that he could not fit within the vehicle sized tunnel, so Pyro got to work digging!

The dragons razor sharp claws were able to slice through the solid rock like butter! Pyro was quite thankful for this fact, as he had quite a bit of mountain to dig out, in-order to fit his titanic body. Hundreds of tons of rubble were sent carelessly backward through his hind legs. The massive long line of traffic was showered with great chunks of rock, and the occasional crumpled vehicle. This resulted in many many deaths as the humans were trapped by the traffic behind them and the highway barriers to their sides.

However, the humans inside the mountain itself were in a no safer situation! The steel reinforced tunnel soon started to crack and crumble. Many panicked humans had crashed their vehicles, trapping those in the tunnel behind them! More and more of the rocky ceiling started to cave in, killing more humans by the second! People started to abandoned their cars and risk it running on foot through the massive tunnel, but even those people would soon be thwarted.

Pyro had dug out enough that he was already able to fit his upper body into the cave. Looking down, he soon realized the humans little excavating burrow would be an issue. “Can’t have these creatures sneaking in and stealing my treasure as I sleep! This should seal it up nicely-”. Pyro then gripped the freshly exposed cave wall with his claws! He started to shake it, sending vibrations along the entire mountain! This proved to be far too much for the human made tunnel, as it began to collapse in multiple places! Thousands of humans were crushed flat inside by the immense weight of the rock. The few survivors lay trapped within the crevasses of the stone, but giving that there was no chance of rescue, those humans only lasted so long until they ran out of air.

Satisfied with the removal of the human burrow, Pyro quickly finished up digging his new den. The massive cavity was just deep enough for him to fit his huge body with folded up wings. The den wasn’t pretty or very deep, but it would have to do for now. He turned himself to the deepest part of the cave and lowered his head. After a few dry heaves, the inorganic objects of his stomach were ejected. The goods splattered out onto the cave floor, coated in a hefty amount of disgustingly smelly mucus. Pyro simply looked at this nasty mess and smiled greatly, “Perfect! I wasn’t too late at all!”. The dragon then turned his body around within the cave, lining up his scaly behind. He then casually sat on the “treasure”, crushing the already damaged luxury goods. Pyro fully lay down, his head resting outside the “small” cave. After a short break to calm down from the stressful event, what does he decide to do next?
11531121211123.title: DIY Den

choices: Nope, the City is all his!
115311212111231.content:
After an hour of lounging upon his new treasure and laying in his makeshift den Pyro pulled him self out. Once free he gave his wings a good stretch as well as his body. Stretching out like a cat he groaned contently as his claws tore up great chunks of earth with each stretch. He looked back into his den. The treasure all compacted thanks to his sheer bulk and was deep in the den. ''It shall be safe here!'' He said to himself. Using his heavy tail he smashed the mountainside, causing a mudslide that covered his den. To him it would take but moments to clear. Humans on the other hand would take hours at the minimum. As an extra guard on his den he pissed upon it. His urine was more like lava than the usual golden liquid. It sizzled and melted into the rock, further protecting his hoard. The smell also acting as a marker for him. But it could also attract other Dragons. 'I wonder if I'm the only one in this area?' He thought. Sniffing the air he smelt no other giant or Dragon.

''Time to find some more treasure!'' He said to himself as he beat his wings and took off. His eyes followed the road which was packed with cars. ''I have enough of these weird little metal 'gems'. But they appear to run between larger formations. If I follow them, they'll lead me to more treasure!'' He flapped his wings and picked up speed as he headed for yet another population centre 'crystal formation'.

So Pyro is heading for another City. But is their another giant already there?
115311212111231.title: Heading out for more treasure

1153112121112312.content:
The trail of gems did their job at leading Pyro to another city. He was soon able to make out the tall pointy crystals jutting out from the earth. A grin soon grew along his scaly mouth, who knows what other pretty trinkets he might find! Just as he was about to increase his pace, the dragon noticed something else about the city. Large billows of smoke were rising in-between the structures! “Drat! Someone else has beaten me to it!”, he said frustratingly! “Well, they better back off, if they know what’s good for them!”, Pyro said angrily under his breath. He then lowered his altitude, flying much lower to the ground to avoid detection as he approached. This once again caused the cars to violently get blown off the road with every beat of his massive wings.

He soon reached the outskirts of the city, continuing to glide low to the ground. He could now hear the smashing and destruction as the creature romped around. Taking a quick sniff...Pyro could tell that it was a fellow dragon! Unlike social creatures that usually get along with those of the same species, dragons are rarely friendly with one another, preferring isolation. Pyro simply grunted further, knowing there was a good chance this meeting would result in conflict. However, Pyro’s scents of smell had been weaken with his older age, so he was unable to identify the dragons type or gender. He would need to do a bit of sneaky reconnaissance to learn that info.

Standing next to the downtown of the city, was a large hilly area. This is where many famous celebrities lived. Massive lavished mansions covered the entire hillside, chocked filled with exorbitant goods. Pyro saw this area as nothing more then a great vantage point to scope out the other dragon. He landed on the opposite side of the hill and began to stealthily climb to the top. He tore through the multi-million dollar mansions without care. To be more conspicuous, he kept his body low to the ground, causing yet more destruction as many more luxurious homes were flattened by his large belly.

At the top of the hill lay the grandest mansions of all the district, which were soon crush flat as Pyro uncaringly sprawled on top of them. Finally having a great view of the city, Pyro intently gazed to see if he could make out more details of the other dragon. Unfortunately, they were blocked by the dense amount of buildings. However, what Pyro could clearly see was that various large skyscrapers were being carelessly tumbled over. The faint sound of human screams could be heard as the buildings tipped, only for them to go dead silent after it crashed down. “Fool! That dragon doesn’t know treasures lie within!”. Annoyed by what he was seeing, Pyro’s massive tail subconsciously swung side to side, destroying many more mansions and their luxury goods. Soon a skyscraper blocking Pyro’s view was knocked down. Finally being able to lay eyes on the other dragon, what does Pyro see?:

- A sexy looking white and gold female dragon, called Kayda. She was infatuated with the shiny buildings, seeing them as treasure. Her tail was raised up high and she was urinating to make the area hers. She had been accidentally knocking buildings over with her raised tail.

- A ferocious looking all black male dragon, called Draco. He was violently stomping everything in his path, yelling profanity, such as “DIE FUCKERS! HAHAHA!!!”. He loved slaughtering those weaker then him! And in his eyes, only he was the strongest! However, he was not too bright and easily fooled.
1153112121112312.title: Luxury Lookout

11531121211123122.content:
Pyro's eyes set up a Dragon with jet black scales. Clearly another male and worse, this Dragon's breathe weapon was acid. His head slim and skeletal. Out of Dragons the most vile and evil. The Draco casually stomped through buildings with out a care! 'All that treasure he's missing! Stupid fucker!' Thought a rather annoyed Pyro. Not only would he have to get rid of the Dragon but he'd have to dig through tons of rubble to get the treasures buried within! Draco snickered ''So fragile! How pathetic! All will be fall before me!'' His tail whipped about, taking out more buildings on either side of him. From his mouth long strands of green highly corrosive acid drooled dong. Sizzling upon the debris, no doubt wrecking treasure and finishing off any buried but alive humans.

But it wasn't just his body that was a danger of his drool. Draco looked down the streets at all the fleeing humans and abandoned cars. ''No one escapes from me!'' He bellowed before belching forth a stream of acid from his maw. The tsunami of acid swallowed everything in the streets and even flooded the lower floors of buildings. Even metal was not safe, the acid so corrosive it would eat through steel within a minute. Flooded buildings soon collapsed. Thousands of humans snuffed out along with millions worth of goods. Pyro started billowing black smoke from his nostrils. Flames flickered from his maw. His eyes glowed brightly. He growled. ''I've had enough of this! Stupid fuck is wrecking all the treasure!'' He stood up atop the hill and spread his wings wide as he let forth a bellowing roar.

121221212.content:
A massive Bull kept a watchful eye on his herd as they grazed. It was tough work to keep all nine of the Cows in his herd safe from wild animals. The female Cows were usually too docile and gentle to defend themselves properly, so it was up to the Bull to protect them. For life in the herd was sometimes tough. In the Bulls eyes, if you weren't part of the herd you were an enemy, and enemies get kicked or trampled. So far, the day had been quite peaceful, with no predators causing them trouble. The herd simply kept happily chowing down on the grass in the field.

The Bull's muscular body was covered in a thick, dark black hind. He stood slightly taller then the females. Between his hind legs hung impressive looking testicles, packed in a long scrotum. His ball sack reached all the way down to his knees and hung freely. The female cows were of the dairy variety, covered in the classic black and white spots. Each one of the females had large utters, which swayed as they walked. Despite their breed, the herd as been living in the wild without any farmer. Multiple flies were also buzzing around the herds smelly behinds and genitals, which was common for their species.

Suddenly, the great Bulls nostrils flared! A strange mysterious light suddenly engulfed the entire herd! The Cows start letting out stressful sounding "Moos!" as the light got brighter and brighter. Soon the panicking herd had their vision completely blocked out!

...

The herds vision finally came back into focus as the light faded. The Bull looked around frantically! He noticed all nine Cows were accounted for and unharmed. Breathing a sigh of relief, the Bull then realized they were in a field very similar to the one from before, but something was very off. Everything around them seemed super flat. No trees, mountains or anything of that sort. Unbeknownst to the Bull and the Cows, they had entered a portal that teleported them to a new world where they were roughly 400ft tall.

The herd then sniffs the ground, its smells like grass, but there was nothing to bite down on! It also tore up super easily by just walking around, as their massive hoofs dug into the soft ground, leaving massive gashes. Annoyed, the Bull realized this new field was useless to them. He began to look around and quickly spots the herds next destination. It was:
121221212.title: Wild

1212212121.content:
A city with a population of over 10 million laid in the distance. The herd had never seen rock formations like that back in their world. It was also the only interesting destination in sight, as everything else looked shorter then their hoofs. This mysterious area peaked the Bull's curiosity. He figured they could look for food later, since most of the herd was already full from eating before they were teleported. Wasting no more time, the Bull set off, with the Cows in his herd quick to follow.

The mighty Bull led his herd, stomping firmly and proudly. His long scrotum now gently swung from side to side as he walked. The Cows were all excited to see this new, unfamiliar area. To get the best unobscured view, they all opted to walk spread out, not directly behind the Bull. Many of them decided to walk adjacent to each other, creating somewhat of a "V" formation, with the Bull in the center of course. This inadvertently meant a lot more untouched area was going to be trampled under their hoofs. The herd was so interested in observing this strange, flat new land, that they were paying no attention to what was underneath them.

Their massive bovine hoofs dug deep into the soft ground. Hundreds of acres of forest and field were quickly laid to waste, becoming nothing more then muddy hoof tracks. Soon the herd was beginning to encounter man made objects. Roads, telephone poles, and the odd farm house were soon decimated by the herds onslaught. The herd didn't even realize the human's structures they were crushing were anything different then the natural landscape. Everything they passed through was so thoroughly destroyed, nothing man made looked remotely recognizable. Continuing on their journey to the city, the herd unexpectedly came across:
1212212121.title: A stroll across the country side

choices: Yes! Their is another giant animal already wrecking the city
No! The city is empty and all theirs to explore
12122121211.content:
The herd then encountered a more substantial collection of humans, a small town. The tallest building was only up to the tops of their hoofs. Once again, the town was so insignificantly small to the massive Bull and Cows, that they just assumed it was a different kind of field. Soon everyone in the towns homes, shops and diners felt massive vibrations, as if a freight train was coming their way. The herd's hoofs crush the various buildings like they were tissue paper. Their massive hoof's dug deep, driving the human remains and debris into the dirt. The Bull and Cows didn't even take much notice, other then the crunching feeling. The herd payed no attention to it, figuring they were simply on top of some kind of crunchy moss. People in the town barely had time to react, before they were flattened under an unsuspecting dirty hoof. With a total of 40 hoofs stomping through, the town didn't stand a chance.

It did not take long for the herd to clear the town. No survivors remained from the herd simply passing through. What they left behind them looked barely recognizable. The once great town was transformed into a bunch of muddy hoof prints. The mucky mess of what was once the town looked no different then the remains of the empty fields they had previously stomped through. It was as if they had erased any signs of the human's existence and returned everything back to its natural state.

The herd continued its march towards the city, still laying waste to everything in their path. Soon the herd realized the ground was getting increasingly crunchy. It started to remind the Cows of walking on fallen leaves on a peaceful autumn day. The crunching actually felt nice, and a few of the Cows let out a pleasurable "Moo". However, for the humans, the herds stroll was causing anything but peace and pleasure. The Herd was now stomping through more and more densely populated areas as they neared the city. Once again, the herd was oblivious that they were destroying millions of dollars worth of human infrastructure and ending many lives with each step. Those who survived the crushing power of a bovines front hoof, found themselves inexplicably mesmerized by the overhead sight of swaying utters or a pair of testicles, before they were squashed by a hind leg. The Bull and Cows carved a massively wide muddy path of destruction through the rows of shopping centers and homes. Sniffing the city, the Bull detected no scent of any other animals. His nostrils, while large, were only powerful enough to pick up animals of regularly sized proportions to him. So far, the Bull was impressed with this location the herd has found themselves in. Sure, they haven't found any grass to eat yet, but they also haven't found any threats to the herd! It was nice to relax a bit, having detected no predators whatsoever. Heck, they had yet to encounter any other animals or intelligent life at all. Of course, the Bull failed to realize the hundreds of crushed human bodies plastered under each one of his hoofs. Even if he had noticed the humans, to him and the herd, they were more like insects then animals. The Bull could definitely get use to living in a peaceful paradise that this world seemed to offer. He thought this as he continued to rip through the cities outskirts, smashing through yet another shopping complex full of people, unknowingly snuffing out their lives. Soon the amount of intact outskirts between the herd and the city was rapidly decreasing, as they neared their destination.

Behind the herd now laid miles and miles of completely trampled roads and buildings. Besides decimating the human population, the herds romp had another unexpected effect. The now completely flattened outskirts allowed for the wind to naturally pick up speed and flow over the flat ground. This is similar to how wind can easily roll over smooth grassy plains. The fresh breeze felt nice, the Cows thought to themselves, as they felt it flowing through their short fur. This new wind blew from behind the herd and then flowed towards the city. However, it did not take long for the natural stench of their many giant bovine bodies to be picked up by the wind. They were too focused on whining about the odor like children, that they all failed to even notice the colossal herd just outside the city. The stench kept getting stronger and peoples complaints louder! However, the citizens would soon be wishing the smell was all they had to deal with.

14233211222112121111211221222221.content:
The female was happy to note that this section of the human's hives lay undisturbed, meaning no animals had been entering their territory. She didn't notice any pawprints or knocked down buildings. That was one positive thing about the humans fragile structures, it was very easy to tell if an animal had passed through. However, looking upwards, she noticed something different. There were multiple birds flying around the area. They were of various types of species you would find on a Savanna, some were quite colorful while others were only dark shades. To the Hyenas, these birds were regularly sized, but to the humans they were giant flying monsters! The birds had come through a portal earlier that day and were trying to adapt to their new environment.

The Matriarch looked up and observed the birds. Quite a few of the flying creatures were landing on the tops and sides of skyscrapers. Their talons easily dug into the faces of the buildings as if they were made of sand. The birds then proceeded to pick at the windows, smashing their beaks inward. After a bit of digging and crashing around, they would pull out a human! The small human struggled and cried out within the bird's grasp. The bird simply flicked its head backwards, sending the human down in-between its beak. Once the bird gobbled them down, they repeated the process, leaving a trail of massive gashes in the buildings. They were picking the humans out as if they were bugs hiding in trees!

The humans inside the buildings tried their best to run away from the areas that the birds were pecking on. However, the birds were smart and quick enough to change pecking locations to where the humans had moved to. To the birds, the humans were way easier to feed on then any bugs they had encountered in the past! A few male birds were even grabbing multiple humans at a time. They held them firmly in their beaks as they flew off to an awaiting female, who was sitting on top of a nearby building. The male bird would then lovingly drop the flailing group of humans into the females beak, where she would swallow them down. The Matriarch knew those bird couples would be creating a nest soon and then get to mating.

The humans who were swallowed by the birds, ended up dying a very painful death. Those who survived the bird's stomach were grounded up alive within the birds gizzard. Besides causing the humans pain and suffering, the bird's digestive system was also very effective at digesting the humans quite quickly. Despite only starting to snack on the humans a short while ago, many birds were already raising their tails and squirting out what was once humans as white liquidy bird poop. The waste was strong enough to shatter through windows. The poo also left massive white streaks all over the entire length of some buildings.

Seeing the birds feasting on the humans and nesting in their territory, what does the Matriarch decide to do?
14233211222112121111211221222221.title: A Flying Feast

142332112221121211112112212222212.content:
Luckily for the birds, the Matriarch did not see them as a threat. She would simply let them continue to feast on the humans. Back in their home on the Savanna, the clan would often see birds nesting in the trees within their territory. If they weren't a problem back then, why should it be any different now? Besides even if they scared the birds away, they would just flock back after the Hyenas left this section of city. The Matriarch also realized, if the Hyena clan did end up consuming all the humans in the hive, they could turn to eating these birds instead! This made her feel more at ease, at least she had a back-up plan if their human supply ran dry. This was extra important, especially after all the destruction the males had done.

The Hyena was grateful it was only harmless birds the clan had found in this section of city. However, seeing how easily the birds had showed up, she was getting worried at other, more dangerous, animal's would soon start making their way in. The humans were easy pickings and she was sure any animal that wandered close wouldn't hesitate to make a meal of them. The Matriarch then thought back to the Lion pride the clan had briefly encountered the previous day. At the rate those Lions were eating and destroying, they would have definitely finished "consuming" their human hive and would be on a hunt for another! They needed to get scent marking ASAP!

The female knew she had to command the males to get those anal glands ready! They would have this whole place stunk up in no time! Right as she was about to open her mouth, a slight bit of debris sprinkled onto her head. This of course didn't hurt, but it was enough to distract her to look upwards. There, she saw a rather large bird smash into an office building, pluck roughly a dozen screaming humans and then fly off. "At least they don't eat much", she thought to herself, slightly amused. She figured only one of her mouthfuls was more humans then multiple birds could ever hope to eat! She then imagined herself swallowing a maw full of tasty humans.

Suddenly, the Matriarch felt her stomach growl. Seeing the birds snacking on the humans made her realize just how hungry she was! She knew the rest of the clan would also be in a similar state of hunger, given that none of them have had a full meal since the previous night. However, she knew delaying the marking further would be risky. Every moment they waited would simply increase the chance of other animals wandering into the many different parts of their city. Should the clan get to marking the area right away or have a snack first?

What does the Matriarch command them to do:
142332112221121211112112212222212.title: Feathered Friends

choices: The clan finally gets to marking that section of city
They suddenly catch a scent down wind!
1423321122211212111121122122222122.content:
While she did want to get to marking, a quick snack wouldn't hurt right? Besides, she had to make sure the clan was nourished, so they were alert and ready for anything. The Matriarch told herself this, trying to help her conscience feel at ease, when really she was just very hungry! With a whoop, she commanded the males to go hunt down some food. The males excitingly broke into a dash, shattering the road surfaces under them, ready to feast! The female quickly followed up her whoop with a fairly angry sounding growl. The males quickly slow down and began walking more cautiously. The first and second males had almost completely forgot about the Matriarch's instructions in their excitement. The clan then split up to go feed on some humans, with the males being sure to copy the females technique she had showed them earlier. Since all the tall skyscrapers were so high up, and infested with birds, all the Hyenas decided to try their luck with a few mid-rise buildings.

The Matriarch was the first to find her building to feed on, which was comprised of luxury condos. The female was impressed how shiny and "pretty" the building looked when compared to others in the city, as it had a fancy modern design. She figured the humans inside must be of high quality then, like they were a premium cut of meat! Wasting no time, she placed her front leg on the buildings roof and began to rub it side to side. This caused the entire building to sway, cracks formed all over as the structure was put under heavy load. Internally, furniture, fragile objects and other human's belongings were going crashing everywhere. The wealthy occupance were in a panic, desperately trying to escape this "earthquake" before the building collapsed! Pushing and shoving, they all ran to the front entrance to escape, just like the Matriarch had planned. She had her maw right at the front doors, greedily slurping and gulping anyone trying to escape. The rich folks expensive perfume and cologne did give them a slightly different taste to the female Hyena, which she enjoyed. It was like they were given some kind of marinade!

However, the humans inside soon caught on, that their was some kind of pink, slimy, smelly monster grabbing people from the front doors! Still in a panic, the humans soon rushed themselves to the side fire exits of the building.

The Matriarch soon grunted angrily. The flow of humans had stopped, but she could still hear them shuffling about inside. She gave the building another strong shake, causing more damage, but not producing more humans. Looking around the building, she soon realized the humans had made extra exits, that they were now using to escape! The Matriarch thought to herself, "I guess these creatures are a bit more clever then I thought. Good thing us Hyena's are still smarter!".

She then used her front paws to crush the fire exit! The humans currently in the doorway were flattened with a sickening "crunch". Debry fell from the upper wall and blocked the exit! Ensuring that it was fully sealed, she also dragged over a bit of shattered debris from another building as well as a few vehicles. She crushed them against the fire exit, completely sealing it off. She repeated the same for the other exits she found. Satisfied with her work, she proceeded to place her maw back to the only exit available to the humans, continuing to send them to a one way trip to her belly.

The rest of the males also had a similar experience to the female. They quickly found and plugged the extra exits of the buildings they had chosen to feast on. Soon about four buildings worth of humans were being digested alive in the four different Hyenas stomachs.

Feeling herself fully stuffed, the female let out a large burp, shattering a few windows. She could still hear a few small groups of humans within the heavily damaged structure. They were cowering in fear, unsure what to do! The Matriarch did not want to eat/kill these last remaining humans, in fact she wanted the exact opposite! She then giggled directly at the group, as if talking to them, "Ok little ones, make sure you have lots and lots and lots of SEX! Breed those numbers back up! I would hate for this to be the last of your flavorful kind". She assumed the rich people with their slightly different flavor from their perfume and cologne were a slight subset of the human species. She definitely would like to taste them again! She just had to wait for them to breed back up so she could have another fill.

Now that all the Hyenas hunger was satisfied, what do they decide to do next?
1423321122211212111121122122222122.title: Having a Flavored Snack

choices: Oh no! It was the pride of Lions from before!
14233211222112121111211221222221222.content:
The Matriarch did not want to delay marking any further. The scent of the city was sure going to change once the males got started! It will be nice to have the city smell like home, she thought to herself. She figured they would start in this section and then work their way around to the rest of the city. As she was briefly lost in her thoughts, she suddenly heard the sound of crashing and screaming humans!

Annoyed, she looked around to see which of the clan's males were causing some destruction. However, she soon noticed all three of the males were sitting patiently, still waiting for her next order. Her eyes went wide as she realized, at least this time, the destruction wasn't being caused by any of the pack. Oh no! She nervously sniffed the air and picked up a whiff of another animal that was entering their territory! She cursed at herself, she should not have delayed the scent marking!

The scent and sound was coming from a far off section of city, in the suburbs. The large female let out a massive whoop, signaling the clan to follow! She then turned herself in the direction of the commotion and set off. She tore through the buildings that stood in her way! It was an emergency after all! They didn't have time to tread carefully on the roads, so she simply plowed a direct path. The humans that laid in her wake had no chance to react, they simply felt massive vibrations before a Hyena paw descended on top of them. She was sure the humans that didn't end up as stains on her paws would appreciate the clan defending the territory. The males quickly raced after the Matriarch, also ripping through everything in their paths. They ran slightly abreast, as if creating a "V" formation. All of the Hyenas dicks flopped greatly as they ran, one of which was growing slightly erect. It was the first male, who loved to crash through buildings. He was having a wonderful time feeling them crumble under paw. He even took this rare opportunity to cheekily aim and stomp the biggest structures that laid in his path.

After running many many miles, the Hyenas started to approached the residential area. The clan dropped onto their bellies and skidded to a stop, turning any humans that were under them into a red smear. Behind them lay miles and miles of complete destruction. Hundreds of buildings were reduced to nothing more then Hyena pawprints along with hundreds of thousands of humans that were now dead. Although, the Matriarch was unworried by all the death and destruction the clan just created. If they didn't stop these invading animals and the clan lost control of their new territory, what good are the human lives then? The Hyenas were hiding behind a few buildings to stay out of sight from the other giant animals. The scent was quite strong, meaning their was a group of the creatures! The Matriarch peeked over the buildings and finally saw what they were dealing with. What was currently in the suburbs?
14233211222112121111211221222221222.title: They Got Company!

choices: A group of Kangaroos jumping around
A flock of Ostriches stomping through
142332112221121211112112212222212222.content: Thankfully the invading animals were not life threatening to the Hyenas, they were somewhat down the food chain. However, these animals still might try to defend themselves if attacked, which could lead to an injury to one of the clan. 142332112221121211112112212222212222.title: A threat to the city, but not to them

choices: Yes! They scare the Ostriches away
1423321122211212111121122122222122222.content:
A flock of about ten Ostriches had wandered in to the cities residential area. The massive birds were about three times taller then the male Hyenas. They each had tall skinny legs and very fluffy, feather covered bodies. The colors of their feathers ranged from a dark black to gray, as the flock had a decent mix of males and females. The heads of the Ostriches looked around, taking in this new and strange environment. Thankfully, it seemed that none of the flock had detected the watching Hyenas.

The flock simply treaded carelessly onto the mass of homes, seemingly ignoring their existence. Each one of the Ostrich's massive talons crushed multiple homes with every step, leaving deep prints. Predictably, the humans who lived in that area were all running around aimlessly in a panic. A few of the Ostriches noticed the tiny running creatures and were casually picking off a few from the crowds. They simply swallowed the humans alive, treating them no differently then simple insects. Most Ostriches just ignored the mass of screaming humans, uncaringly stomping them all out underfoot. The potent odor of the Ostriches bodies caused many of the humans below to cough and gag. The humans were so distracted by the smell, that they were unable to focus on more important things, like dodging incoming Ostrich feet.

With the twenty stomping talons, it was not long before the flock had created a massive amount of destruction to the suburb. The Ostriches were quite spread out from each other, walking over the entire width of the area. As they made their way across the suburbs, the flock wasn't carving a trail of destruction, they were wiping everything out! What lay behind the Ostriches was completely devastated, all that remained of the once lovely neighborhood was exposed earth mixed in with bits of debris.

The Matriarch watched the Ostrich flock intently as they wrecked the suburbs. She was not sure what to do! On one paw, it seemed like the massive birds were only passing through the clans territory. This meant the Hyenas could avoid a potentially painful conflict if they just stayed hidden. Plus, since the city's humans gave the clan plenty of nourishment, it wasn't necessary to hunt down the Ostriches for food.

However, at the rate the Ostriches were going, the entire area of tiny human hives was going to be completely leveled! Every second that passed, more and more of the area was wiped off the map. She watched anxiously for a few more moments, before she finally made her decision. Does she command the clan to save the suburbs or do they simply leave them to the Ostriches?

The older Wolf had smashed his tail right into the side of a building! The once shiny facade crumbled away into a mess of a grey like sandy substance, that spilled onto the street below. Various pieces of furniture also came tumbling out, as well as a few humans!

"Whoopsie", the older Wolf said sheepishly, as he scratched the back of his head.

"Careful!", the younger male growled! Clearly more upset at the destruction that was just caused.

The older male simply rolled his eyes. "I can only be so careful! There's barely any room to walk! It was only a matter of time before one of us smashed into these hives". The older Wolf blurted out in frustration, almost wanting to give the building another tail whack to exemplify his point. While the older anthro didn't want to outright hurt the humans, he was much less concerned with preserving their structures. To him, the destruction was no worse then stepping through a spider web or on an ant hill.

"I-I guess, but it still not nice to damage the home you were invited in", the younger male whimpered out, knowing well he was in no position to argue with the other Wolves authority.

"I'm sure these creatures expected a bit of accidental damage when they led us down here. Especially with how easily these hives crumble. Besides, I can only imagine the destruction that happens to this place when their predator's attack them. I'm sure these small creatures will have all damages fixed up in no time".

"Well I-... Ok sorry, your right. Just try and be careful". The older male did have a point, the humans were making them do quite a squeeze to follow them. They had to be expecting a few small accidents right? The younger male bit his lip as he looked forward down the ever increasingly narrow path. He knew he would also be causing some damage if he wanted to follow the humans.

The Wolves continued trudging onwards. Despite both their best efforts, a decently large trail of destruction was left in their wakes. Exciting wagging tails smashed through windows, butts took out multiple floors, muscular thighs crashed facades and even their sheaths dug in deep as they squeezed by. Many buildings were left with gaping holes, ripped off sides and other various states of destruction. The younger Wolf did his best to ignore the sounds of destruction he was causing, not daring to look back behind him. He also didn't want to admit it to himself, but it felt quite nice when the crumbling buildings rubbed against his body, especially down below. The older Wolf had also noticed this, being sure to give his now poking red rocket a rub when he was forced to squeeze by. As they both continued smashing through, what happens?
1522212111211221221212241122222111112221.title: Destructive Squeeze

1522212111211221221212241122222111112221.content:
Both Wolves were soon deep within the very core of the city. The younger male continued to look around in awe! There was so much to take in! Buildings stretched out as far as the eye could see in all directions! His excitement was helping keep his mind off the almost constant crumbling sounds, coming from the unintentional destruction behind him.

Up ahead, he could see yet another impossibly thin space he would have to squeeze through, between two condo buildings. Giving a soft sigh, he walked forward and began to carefully push his body through the space. He felt the faces of the buildings pressing up tightly against his thighs. In response, he tried his absolute best to squish his legs together to make more room, only to feel the faces of the said buildings crumble away into mere dust. A feeling by this point, he had almost gotten accustom to, given how many buildings laid destroyed behind him.

However, in addition to the crumbling architecture, the younger Wolf suddenly felt another feeling, but this time within his gut? Without warning, he had a slight, almost painful feeling coming from within his body! "Wait, err somethings not right", he said in a weakened voice, as he stopped and clenched his stomach.

This quickly caught the other Wolves attention. He turned his body to look over in the younger Wolves direction. His tail smashed into the side of the building behind him, sending a large chunk of the contents and humans flying. He also leaned over the apartment building between him and the younger Wolf, to get a better view of what was wrong. This caused the roof of the structure to crack greatly in many places. His sheath also sunk into the side of the building. The older Wolf ignored the rather pleasant feeling down below for now, but that didn't stop his penis from unconsciously expanding out from his sheath, plowing deeper into the structure. His thick musk soon flooded all throughout the building, causing the humans inside to go from screaming in fear to choking in disgust. Seeing his partner in distress, he called out, "Oh dear, is everything alright over there?".

After a few seconds of weakened moaning from the sensation in his gut, the Wolf was able to answer. What was wrong with the younger anthro?

His hunger just hit him, he needs to find food fast! But the only thing around to eat are humans...

He has to take a massive piss! But there's no time to leave the humans homes!
1522212111211221221212241122222111112221.title: A Sudden Need

choices: Smash through buildings in an attempt to pee outside the city
1522212111211221221212241122222111112221.content:
"Oh man! I got to pee so bad!"

The water they had drank from the river last night was finally ready to leave the younger Wolf. All the squeezing and stretching the Wolf had done as he traveled deeper into the city, had put extra pressure on his bladder. The massive anthro began to hop from one paw to the other, preforming an impromptu "pee dance". His motions created great vibrations for the area, almost like a mini earthquake. The interiors of many human's homes were turned into an absolute mess as their belongings went crashing all around!

The older anthro gave the younger Wolf a strange look. "Why not just go?", the older Wolf said confusingly. He then took several deep whiffs of the cities air. "Its not like anyone's marked this area, it's free for you to take". Having not detected the scent of urine in the city, the older Wolf couldn't think of any other reason why the other anthro would hesitate instead of simply peeing away.

"I-I don't want to go right in the middle of all their homes!", the younger anthro stuttered out, finding it increasingly difficult to hold back the floodgates.

The older Wolf snickered slightly. He casually rested his folded arms on the building to his front, caving in the roof slightly. He was much more relaxed, knowing the only issue was the younger Wolf's silliness. He continued speaking in an amused voice. "Well, I see you got two options. You can either rip through a bunch of hives, trying to rush outside the creature's territory to pee, or just relieve yourself right here and now". He found the entire predicament so ridiculous! Why would anyone be worried about where they were peeing? Back in their home world, as long as another Wolf hadn't already marked the area, it was fair game! The older Wolf was sure the humans who live in this city got peed on all the time by other giant passing creatures! Especially with how vertical their structures are, they seemed like perfect things to spray down and mark!

The younger male didn't know what to do! He was so deep in the tightly packed city, that if he tried to quickly leave, he would end up creating massive amounts of destruction! On the other paw, he could just start pissing away where he stood, but he was sure the humans wouldn't appreciate him stinking up their hive with his piss! Barely able to hold it in any longer, what does the Wolf decide to do?
1522212111211221221212241122222111112221.title: When Nature Calls in the Big City

1522212111211221221212241122222111112221.content:
His eyes darted everywhere as he tried to find an appropriate place to relieve himself. He wanted to avoid damaging or stinking up the human's homes. As he desperately searched, his hopping became faster as he felt the pressure build. Buildings rocked from the massive force of the Wolf stomping. Both of his forepaws were wrapped around his sheath to forcefully stop the flow. Even his penis was starting to instinctually emerge, as if forced out from the pressure.

But everywhere he looked was packed with tall human hives! If simply brushing up against a building damaged it, he couldn't imagine what a strong stream of piss would do! He would end up drowning the humans inside and on the ground alive! Time was running out and he would soon start pissing away, whether he liked it or not. There has to be some where he cou-

CRACK

The Wolf instantly stopped his pee dance. The shock of the sudden noise thankfully caused his bladder to clench, which bought him a bit of extra time. As he had stomped his paw down, one of his claws had broken through the hard road surface below. Quickly peering down, he noticed... the path under him was actually hollow?

An idea sparked in his mind and ignited his body into motion. He quickly bent down on all fours and started digging at the tiny hole with his two upper paws. He was in such a hurry to execute his idea, the anthro didn't take notice to the chunks of road that were being flung back through his legs. The debris went soaring through the air, heading right towards a few apartment buildings! The humans inside barely got a chance to panic as the fast flying chunks impacted them. Massive craters were punctured into the face of the structure. Those within the impact radius were instantly killed. Completely unaware of the destruction, he simply kept digging away until the hole was big enough. "This is perfect!", he quickly thought to himself, moving to get into position.

He quickly laid his body down flat along the road. Storefronts at the base of buildings were completely caved in by his massive legs and arms. Once again, he was still too desperate to notice. He shuffled a bit, pulling his loincloth out of the way. Once the path was clear, he began to frantically shove his dick into the hole he had just dug out. Less then a second after it was inserted, he began pissing away!

The fowl liquid completely flooded the exposed subway tunnel. The piss was quick to flow along the underground path, flooding everything in its way! Many subway trains were also traveling along the tunnels. They were completely packed with citizens trying to escape the city. The passengers were first treated to the fowl odor of Wolf urine, before the train was impacted and enveloped in the piss! The humans that weren't immediately killed, were promptly drowned. The younger Wolf was of course completely oblivious to all of this, as he kept on emptying out his sore bladder. He had simply assumed the hollow area under the road was a natural formation, not made by the humans. As he pumped out yet more fowl urine, it continued to flood more of the subway system, easily traveling far and wide throughout the entire city. The scent was too weak for the Wolves to notice, but for the small humans, it definitely stunk up every area with a subway station.

The older Wolf chuckled. He very well knew that the younger anthro had just flooded the humans burrows with his piss. While he did find the situation amusing, he didn't have the heart to mention it to him outright. He felt it would devastate the other Wolves feelings, especially with all the effort he put into not pissing on them.

After quite a while, the younger Wolf finally finished emptying his bladder. With a huff, he simply got up from the ground, allowing his dick to flop free, and dusted himself off. In addition to the great feeling of relief, he was also quite pleased that none of the human’s hives had been urinated on. However, the hole he had dug out was now emanating quite the stench! In yet another display of politeness, the Wolf decided to cover up his scent. He noticed one of the nearby buildings was a multi level parking garage. It was full of all kinds of colorful vehicles, but not humans. Still believing cars are nothing more then discarded insect shells, he grabbed hold of the parking garage and purposefully collapsed it onto the roadway. He then easily dragged the debris over to cover up the smelly hole.

The older male rolled his eyes. The other Wolf’s concerns were so overdramatic! While he was scoffing, he too suddenly felt a feeling from his body. This prompted him to perform quite the grin on his maw. The older Wolf then piped up, saying, "I guess now would be a bad time to mention-"
1522212111211221221212241122222111112221.title: A Metro Release

choices: Yes! He smells another giant animal nearby!
No, he only smells the piss
1522212111211221221212241122222111112221.content:
The older male cheekily grinned, "Hehe, looks like I got to take a piss as well!". Unlike the younger male, he felt no need to be careful when peeing within the human’s hives. The world was his bathroom and this place was no exception! Looking around, his instincts told him to naturally aim at the tallest object, as if pissing on a tree. He quickly spotted a large high-rise, just a little further up the road, onto his right. Without warning, the Wolf began to walk along the road towards the tall structure. The older Wolf was moving quite quickly, using much less discretion then before, which amounted to more damage to the surrounding structures facing the road. The younger Wolves eyes went wide, as he saw the other anthro quickly take off. He hurried after him, being forced to rush as well, creating more destruction of his own.

After a dozen or so quite destructive paces, the older wolf was in-front of the building he chose as his toilet. The humans inside the corporate building looked in fear as the giant stood in-front of them. Some brave humans even approached the glass, thinking maybe the creature was friendly? They had seen early news reports of the anthros trying their best to squeeze around the buildings, not trample them. Unfortunately for those humans, their trust had been misplaced in the older Wolf. As with a simple grunt he gripped his sheath and unceremoniously began pissing away! The stream instantly penetrated the buildings windows, soaking those trusting humans in the face! Multiple floors of fancy offices were instantly flooded with the heavy piss! Humans, office equipment and even furniture were carried by the flow. The building’s stairwells became like rapids! Mostly unaware of their plight, the older Wolf simply sighed at the pleasant pleasure of his release. He didn’t feel he was being rude to the humans, he saw this as nothing more then taking a piss on a tree that a squirrel lived in, the little critters didn’t seem to care!

However, the younger Wolf was not of the same opinion as his companion, as he angrily watched with crossed arms. "Couldn't you be just a little more careful", the younger Wolf said in frustration, quietly under his breath. Annoyed, the peeing male turned to face his direction. Unfortunately, as the older male shifted his body, the stream’s aim changed as well! The thick torrent arced and splattered over multiple buildings. This also shattered their windows and soaked the insides! The piss stream left deep marks, like peeing in sand.

The older Wolf then responded "Did you say something?". He was still peeing away, but now on a completely different building!

"N-No! Nothing at all!" the younger Wolf quickly clambered out, realizing he had just inadvertently caused the older Wolf to hose down so many more buildings.

"Humph, that’s what I thought!", the Wolf added, not realizing it wasn’t his imposing figure that made the younger Wolf shut up, but the fact he was drenching so many more human creations with his piss! He then turned his body back to face the original chosen building. This gave the other buildings another fresh spray of potent Wolf urine as he put his aim back to how it originally was.

The younger male look sadly upon the section of city. The once pristine, shiny area, was reduced to a smelly, yellow tinted mess. The proud buildings were now covered in multiple scars where the piss stream had hit them. It looked as if someone had taken a piss on a large sand castle! The stairwell rapids were now leaking out the bottom of the buildings, carrying various furniture and even humans. The younger Wolf was happy to see that a few humans who had been carried by the stream, were still alive, as they struggled in the yellow pool. However, he had failed to realize just how many had drowned within the buildings themselves.

After quite some time, the older Wolves stream finally started to slow to a trickle. He shook his dick off over a side-street, each drop was big enough to crush several vehicles. “Ahhh! Much better! Nothing like taking a nice piss in the great outdoors”, the Wolf said sarcastically, as if trying to drive his point home. However the younger Wolf was still not thrilled. Besides the damage, he sure hoped the humans didn't mind the smell of Wolf piss, as the area now reeked of it.

As the younger Wolf was taking in the older males scent, does he notice the smell of something else mixed in?
1522212111211221221212241122222111112221.title: Take 2 Of a Number 1

1522212111211221221212241122222111112221.content:
Despite the entire area being flooded with the older Wolves “aroma”, the younger Wolves incredibly sensitive nose picked up something else. Quickly forgetting about the pissed logged buildings, the anthro started to raise his nose up high and sniff wildly. The other anthro saw this and snickered, “What, never taken in the scent of a REAL male before?”. However, the older Wolves cocky grin soon faded away when he saw the concerned look of his companion. “Don’t you smell that? There’s a wild animal (feral) coming our way!”.

The older Wolves eyes went wide as he joined in taking great sniffs of air. Although, he soon snarled in frustration! “Damn! I can’t smell anything other then my piss! Curse this old nose of mine! Can you tell if it’s a threat?”

Using every fiber of his being not to call the other Wolf an old geezer, the younger Wolf went back to sniffing. With a few more deep whiffs, he was able to pin down the species of the approaching animal. “Hmm, OK, I think I smell that it’s a-”

Is the approaching feral a predator or prey?
1522212111211221221212241122222111112221.title: Approaching Animal

155132.content:
Swampy the large male anthro Sitatunga slept peacefully on the beach. He was only awakened by a loud whooshing sound and when he could feel water on his legs. What the hell?!'' He gasped as he sat up and looked around. The beach was a lot smaller, so small in fact barely his rump could fit upon the sand. ''Why is everything small and where are my clothes?!'' Asked the Sitatunga. It was at this point he saw the people, to him they were the size of beetles. ''What are these creatures?'' He muttered as he reached for them with his hand. He easily caught several people and lifted them up to his face. He studied them intently. ''oh, they have two legs, two arms and hands. Ooh is that clothes they're wearing?'' He said to himself as he looked the people over. ''Aw you're all so small! How amazing!'' He laughed. The little people ran about his large hand, looking for a way off. Swampy groaned ''I wouldn't jump! Actually I better do something''. He sealed his hand, trapping the people within. He did not crush them however.

He groaned stood up to his full height. He towered over everything in the area. The trees were more like really small bonsai trees to him. His horns were exceptionally long ones even by Sitatunga standards, now they were hundreds of feet long. He could see little ships in the sea, just like back home. Inland he could see roads and buildings. 'I must be on a planet like mine, just everything is smaller!' He thought. He looked down at himself, he was of course completely naked he remembered the little people he still had sealed in his hand. ''Oh well. I'd better do something'' he sighed. He opened up his hand to study the people once more. They reeked of fear. They seemed to speak, but he couldn't understand a word of it. ''Ooh mm I scary?'' He asked.
