1553132211211.content:
You are siting in the window seat of a plane, trying to fall asleep as the flight will be quite long and you will have to wake up early in the morning tomorrow and it's already late so you might as well catch some sleep while you can.

Just as your eyes start to close, you see the light outside of your window dim quite dramatically. You think nothing of it but some of the other passengers seem to be pointing out the windows and the volume in the cabin starts to rise as many people start to talk, first at a whisper but soon growing louder and louder.

Seeing as these conditions are not conductive of sleep, you take a look outside of the window yourself and gasp at what you see. A massive bird is hovering in the air not too far off from the plane. It looks confused and is turning it's head from left to right as if it is trying to gain back it's bearings. It is impossible to judge how big the bird is from your point of view but from the looks of it, it is at least large enough that it would make you have a pretty bad time should it notice the plane.

Unfortunately, that is exactly what it does. The bird locks eyes on the plane and it seems to look at your in particular, though that could be a mere coincidence. The canary starts to fly towards the plane at a rapid pace. It looks like it would easily able to outstrip all but the fastest fighter jets, though even those could be hard pressed to beat the massive bird.

The volume in the cabin continues to rise as the canary gets closer to the plane, first starting at a curious whisper and soon growing to shocked yelling. The canary quickly catches up to the plane and catches it in it's claws, the hull of the plane denting heavily and the wings being crushed under the powerful talons of the far to big to exist bird. You can see where the canary's talons are as there are huge portions of the metal protruding a good foot inwards. But strangely enough the bird, despite being more than capable of it, does not crush the plane any more than it had already done so.

The canary starts to fly off with the plane and it's screaming passengers in it's claws.

Where does it take the plane?

choices: Wants to explore this little  world
15533333.content:
So a Shadow/death Shroud Hellhound? This Hellhound is almost always formed as a Shadow. Light, can pass through most objects and turn invisible if necessary. When in Shadow form the Hellhound's entire body is a near complete black fog, the shape typically remains as a canid. The Hellhound in shadow form has glowing green eyes, all other features are just black fog. When 'hungry' the Hellhound will feast of the life force of victims by enveloping them and sucking the life right out of the victim.

The Hellhound was casually strolling through a dark forest in shadow form when he was whisked away. He looked at around at his new and unfamiliar surroundings. Looking down the Hellhound could see light, he lowered his head for closer look. His green eyes lit up the ground, revealing lots of buildings smaller than his paws. The hellhound grinned, he was a giant looming over a tiny little town!

People in the town noticed that something strange was happening. Two green glowing orbs hovered high in the sky. The streetlights were reflecting off something huge and misty. The green orbs lowered over them to reveal they were eyes and the black mist was the form of a huge canine! People started to scream and panic.

The Hellhound listened to the peoples screams and he watched them run in terror. He could sense their fear. He loved the scent of it, he lulled his shadowy tongue as he just inhaled the little humans fear. The people were pushing past each other and driving madly for the roads out of town. It was anarchy. Looters used the chaos to break into shops, cars slammed into each other and pedestrians. The Hellhound just remained motionless, enjoying the chaos he was causing below.

But the Hellhound would soon act for he...

The paw passed through everything with ease, causing no damage. Within the shadowy paw were some humans. They screamed briefly as they thought they would be squished flat. They looked around to see nothing but dense black fog before they passed out for good. The Hellhound sucked the life out of them, he growled it was like eating tiny crumbs. He need more... Thousands upon thousands more! He stomped on through the town in one of the most undestructive monster rampages ever. Any damage caused was not by him but the humans themselves. People tried to hide in buildings, cars, and even tunnels. The hellhound's Shadowy form penetrated all and once in his shadow they were his to devour. In ten minutes the town's inhabitants were all dead, their physical bodies remained but their lifeforce nourished the Hellhound.

The Hellhound looked about at the now empty town. The humans had entertained him and provided him with some nourishment. But still he need more. Sniffing the air the Hellhound sensed more humans in the distance. He grinned and headed for them. He was heading right for...
155333332.title: A small snack

15533334.content: Really Electric Hellhound or see other options?
15533334.title: Electric Hellhound

155333342.content:
This creature is covered in light pink, soft fur. It possesses the ability to control things with its mind. The Hellhound can easily pick up and levitate objects much heavier then itself. It also has the ability to hypnotize other creatures. The larger the creature, the more difficult it is to take over its mind. Something of an equal size to the canine could pose a challenge, but a small bug could be hypnotized with little effort. Once hypnotized, the canine can easily force them to follow its commands, no matter how dangerous or disgusting they might be.

It has a gemstone on its forehead that glows when it psychic abilities are in play. This species of Hellhound is usually very proud, condescending and snooty. They have been known to care very little about those that they deem unworthy to them.
155333342.title: Psychic Hellhound

1553333422.content:
This creature’s fur is mostly comprised of green moss. While it can get energy from the sun, this Hellhound can also eat meat like any other canine. Plants instantly grow out of the ground from its pawprints. The Hellhound can sprout vines from its body, using them to attack and strangle prey. When a male ejaculates, if any of its “seed” happens to hit the ground, it will spontaneously grow into a massive forest, easily taking over miles of land!

These creatures are usually very kind-hearted and gentle. However, one large exception is when it comes to the destruction of plant life and the natural world. Anything that harms nature usually meets its end from this Hellhounds wrath. It of course also greatly despises any form of pollution. It will attempt to snuff out any sort of smoke or fumes.
1553333422.title: Plant Hellhound

15533334222.content:
This canine is covered in a pure white coat! Great shards of ice jut out from its shoulders, pointing high into the air. It's bodily fluids are like liquid nitrogen. This frosty creature can freeze anything solid in one simple breath, or flatulence.

It prefers frigid arctic weather. Anything above freezing is greatly uncomfortable for it. Warm temperatures can even be fatal! Luckily, this Hellhound also has the power over the weather, able to conjure up arctic blizzards and greatly lower the overall temperature of the area.

It's demeanor closely matches its cold appearance. It prefers to be alone, only opening up to others of the same species.
15533334222.title: Ice Hellhound

155333342222.content:
Its body is covered in brilliant blue scales that sparkle in the light! This Hellhound could easily be mistaken for part fish! It loves to swim around in either salt or fresh water and has the ability to breathe while either submerged or in open air.

Similar to other aquatic life, it does not prefer to be on land, however the Hellhound can tolerate it. The creature sometimes even chooses ground over water if it's curious or hungry for something other then seafood. When above water, it can get quite odorous, smelling greatly of raw fish.

However, being stuck on land usually isn't a big deal for this species of Hellhound, as it has the ability to create monsoons at will! This usually ends up creating large floods, or at least enough for the Hellhound to swim in an impromptu lake.

It also has another ability to moisten it's area, as it urinates quite heavily and frequently. Logically one would think that it's pee would be quite diluted, but that isn't the case at all, its urine can actually be quite potent!

It has a fun and carefree attitude. However this canine wouldn't think twice about flooding an area if it felt like going for a swim.
155333342222.title: Water Hellhound

1553333422222.content:
A very unique Hellhound, on its back sits an absolutely massive insect hive! This hive is very much apart of its natural body, blending in with its flesh.

Bee type insects who live in the hive are also very much an extension of the Hellhounds body. They share the same hive mind. The insects are able to act on the Hellhounds thoughts and the Hellhound is even able to feel pain if a single bee is killed, even if they are physically far off. Their connection is so great, the Hellhound can even telepathically see through a single one of their bee's at a given time. This can be very useful for scouting out a new area. The bees do not have a queen, new larva is produced by an organ inside the canine. At any given time, dozens of bees can be seen circling around the Hellhounds body.

The bugs will go out to explore, collect food and even defend the Hellhound with their stingers. The canine's veins course with honey that the bees produce. The sweet sugary smell emanating from the creature has it always on the lookout for predators that might attack it.

The Hellhound and its bees are usually quite docile unless provoked. However, as far as the Hellhound is concerned, bugs that are not of its own, are immediately seen as enemies that will steal it's precious honey! Usually, any other insects this creature comes across, end up being simply eradicated by either the bees stingers or its mighty paws.
1553333422222.title: Bug Hellhound

15533334222222.content:
This massive hulking creature has a dry, rocky coating on its body. Its massive weight causes it to slowly lumber along, cracking the ground with every pawprint. Its slow speed is not an issue for this Hellhound, as it’s stony hide is impervious to almost any attack, so it never needs to run from danger. Underneath its hardened exterior is still a body of flesh like a canine, so it still has similar bodily functions.

It feeds on various stones and rocks of its mountainous world. The Hellhound is able to easily crush them into rubble with its mighty jaws before swallowing. Despite never encountering anything modern, materials such as concrete and metal taste quite good to it. It usually does not prefer the flavors of organic creatures. Its saliva and urine are incredibly acidic, similar to volcanic geysers.

It has a stone cold attitude, cares very little for creatures other then itself.
15533334222222.title: Rock Hellhound

155333342222222.content:
A Hellhound from far into a dark future. The right side of its skull, right eye, its front left leg, its right hind leg, and a large portion of its back have all been replaced with mechanical parts! The artificial body parts are quite cyberpunk like, with large black cables running around and ominous glowing blinking lights (think Borgs from Star Trek). The rest of its body, including its canine genitals, are all still organic.

It has various mechanical weapons as well. Out of its cybernetic eye, a red glowing laser can be fired, able to easily slice through anything in its path! The creature also has missiles, able to shoot out of latched compartments in its back. The Hellhounds body is able to naturally generate these missiles from the organic and inorganic objects the creature ingests.

Beyond its physical weapons, this Hellhound is also able to hack into networks, processing petabytes of data per second! It uses this ability to learn about its enemies weaknesses. It can even take control of other machinery, often doing this to use its enemies weapons against them. It’s anthro owner is also part machine. Together, they are part of a cyborg clan who are currently at war with another species of anthro. Their enemies have instead opted to use genetic engineering to enhance their bodies. This has made the Cyborg Hellhound automatically assume fully organic lifeforms as enemies, as nothing more then something to be terminated.

Its thoughts are cold and calculated. It has a partly mechanical mind, so all of its internal dialogue are something similar to the instructions of a machine. “HALTING...SCANNING AREA...THREAT FOUND” etc. However, it still indulges in its biological tendencies from time to time, such as having good old fashioned fun and even breeding! “PENIS EMERGING FROM SHEATH...CURRENT TASK OVERRIDE TO: MASTURBATION”.
155333342222222.title: Cyborg Hellhound

1553333422222222.content:
Calling this species of Hellhound loud would be a complete understatement! It’s barks, snarls and howls could be heard from dozens of miles around! If that didn’t make them loud enough, two large speaker type organs sit atop its head, as if they were massive round ears (Similar to a Noivern https://cdn.bulbagarden.net/upload/1/15/...). However, these are used for anything but hearing! Along with its super loud voice, this Hellhound is able to use these organs to amplify itself to reach levels of almost impossibly high volume! They can even send out massive shock waves from these large orifices, shattering anything in their paths!

Neon green stripes run along its jet black body. The same green color can be seen on its claws, teeth, eyes and even as circular patterns in its large, speaker-like ears. These sections are also bioluminescent, and can be seen glowing in the dark.

Apart from sending out massive shock waves, they can also use these strange organs to manipulate vibrations to create a type of force field. This can protect them from incoming projectiles and most importantly, fellow Hellhound attacks! In their home world, males will often fight over females and territory with shock waves. To them, a creatures volume is akin to the antlers of a deer. Large rocks are often found blasted apart after a fight. Oh and once a male wins over a female, you can just imagine how loud they get when they reach orgasm!

Despite their immense volume, the creatures have an incredibly wide range of hearing. They could easily make out the sound of an ant crawling, while also being OK with listening to something as loud as a nuclear blast!

Their attitude is very energetic and hyperactive, as if they had just ingested multiple energy drinks. These Hellhounds are also always looking to show off that they’re the loudest, whether they were asked or not! They are quite unaware of their extreme volume when compared to other creatures. Many other animals of their world have learned to stay well away of these Hellhounds, especially if they value their eardrums.
1553333422222222.title: Sound Hellhound

15533334222222222.content:
This majestic Hellhound is actually comprised of roughly 25% water vapor. Its fur is a brilliant white, like Cumulus clouds. Even small white puffy clouds collect around its neck like a scarf. Its body is very light. Even something like insects don’t get crushed underneath its paws when stepped on. However its still quite an unpleasant experience for the small bug, as they are pushed against the ground.

This Hellhound can also control wind and partly the weather. It can manipulate air currents to lift its light body upwards, giving it a decent flight ability. If the creature is very bothered, they can even go as far as creating tornadoes at will, blowing their opponents away! Sunny days have also been known to cloud over, if this creature is feeling very sad.

They also absolutely hate any form of air pollution. Even something as simple as a bonfire would get blown out by this creature, and the one responsible severely punished. Because of this, no creatures in its world have evolved to make use of any type of fire.

This species of Hellhound are generally quite shy and well reserved. Its barks and yelps are usually very soft and quiet. They usually prefer to hide away out of sight, then to directly interact with others.
15533334222222222.title: Air Hellhound

info.brief_description: Portals bring forth giant animals to the world.
info.description:
Portals open up on a distant world populated by giant animals. Curious giants enter such portals to find themselves on a planet of a smaller scale...

Rules...

This story is from a third person perspective - He/She/They. Not first (I) or second (You) perspectives.

No giant humans.

Any giant animal of any species, real, extinct, mythological or fictional.

Any body type Feral, Anthro or even Taurs.

Height can vary from a few hundred feet to five thousand feet. However, the size scale needs to stay the same for a storyline.
Unless of course there is a 'normal' size difference A 3ft Feral Wolf to a 8ft anthro Lion. But no 200ft Wolves with a 2500ft one in
the same storyline!

The giant Anthros & Taurs can be from any time period/culture.

Feral animals maybe either wild, pet/companions for the anthros/Taurs or sentient.
Pets/companions may have collars, harnesses saddles etc. Whilst wild of course won't have anything artificial.

Language - For simplicity all characters 'speak' English. Though in reality the giants have their own languages it will
be difficult to make up several new languages. Humans won't understand a giant and vice versa though to us they would both
be talking clear English

The 'small' planet is basically modern Earth with humans but it's not Earth Itself.

Real places, landmarks, buildings etc. Can be used as a reference in the story though.

New portals may open up to remove/add giants, for some reason humans can't be transported through the portals.

The story can change to follow a new giant instead, but try to leave an option to still follow the previous giant.

Any theme allowed. The giants can be harmed/ killed by each other or by humans, they aren't invincible!

Oh and 'attack' isn't always accurate. The giants could be friendly or curious but a 500ft tall giant is going to cause some damage even if it's unintentional.
